2021.overview: The story of Marian Finucane’s life and career as recounted by John Clarke, her husband and confidant. Raw and eloquent, Clarke takes us behind her public persona, painting an intimate portrait of their 40-year life together.

2021.title: The Seduction of Rose Parrish
2021.overview: Reeling from a bad breakup, Rose leaves LA and moves into her ancestral home, a massive estate filled with ornate antiques, rooms upon rooms and things that go bump in the night. Suddenly Rose begins hearing voices and seeing strange visions and soon she realizes that she's not alone: the ghost of a long dead man walks the corridors, longing for Rose and ushering her into a world of forbidden love and spectral sensuality.

2021.title: Una Temporada en el Cielo
2021.overview: Rodrigo, an old man, falls in love of Jorge, a precocious boy.

2021.title: Once Upon Amsterdam
2021.overview: Presents a day in the life in Amsterdam, a city in transformation, captured shortly after the turn of the millennium, and shortly before the digital revolution would speed up the pace of life considerably. Shot in a fly-on-the-wall style.

2021.title: Videographe 50th Anniversary
2021.overview: A video vignette marking the 50th anniversary of the artist-run centre Le Vidéographe

2021.title: Sorrow had a baby
2021.overview: ‘I absorbed the women in my life as I would chloroform on a cloth laid against my face.’ (Vivian Gornick). Sorrow had a baby explores the mother-daughter relationship through multiple lenses: memory, beauty, and inheritance. Jumping between home movies, TV shows, and raw intimate documentary footage the short film asks: Who writes the stories in a family? Who can change them?

2021.title: The Batman
2021.overview: In his second year of fighting crime, Batman uncovers corruption in Gotham City that connects to his own family while facing a serial killer known as the Riddler.

2021.title: Top Gun: Maverick
2021.overview: After more than thirty years of service as one of the Navy’s top aviators, and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him, Pete “Maverick” Mitchell finds himself training a detachment of TOP GUN graduates for a specialized mission the likes of which no living pilot has ever seen.

2021.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
2021.overview: Set more than a decade after the events of the first film, learn the story of the Sully family (Jake, Neytiri, and their kids), the trouble that follows them, the lengths they go to keep each other safe, the battles they fight to stay alive, and the tragedies they endure.

2021.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
2021.overview: While working underground to fix a water main, Brooklyn plumbers—and brothers—Mario and Luigi are transported down a mysterious pipe and wander into a magical new world. But when the brothers are separated, Mario embarks on an epic quest to find Luigi.

2021.title: Evil Dead Rise
2021.overview: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

2021.title: Fast X
2021.overview: Over many missions and against impossible odds, Dom Toretto and his family have outsmarted, out-nerved and outdriven every foe in their path. Now, they confront the most lethal opponent they've ever faced: A terrifying threat emerging from the shadows of the past who's fueled by blood revenge, and who is determined to shatter this family and destroy everything—and everyone—that Dom loves, forever.

2021.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
2021.overview: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn’s full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters the Spider Society, a team of Spider-People charged with protecting the Multiverse's very existence. But when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders and must set out on his own to save those he loves most.

2021.title: Oppenheimer
2021.overview: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.

2021.title: Graphic Desires
2021.overview: When reclusive Franklin cheats on his partner with a mysterious girl he meets on a dating app, it becomes the start of a deadly obsession.

2021.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
2021.overview: Black Manta seeks revenge on Aquaman for his father's death. Wielding the Black Trident's power, he becomes a formidable foe. To defend Atlantis, Arthur (Aquaman) forges an alliance with his imprisoned brother. They must protect the kingdom.

2021.title: Dune: Part Two
2021.overview: Follow the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a path of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, Paul endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

2021.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
2021.overview: A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life with his days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. But when his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctant Wolverine.

2021.title: The Wild Robot
2021.overview: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz is stranded on an uninhabited island. To survive the harsh environment, Roz bonds with the island's animals and cares for an orphaned baby goose.

2021.title: Moana 2
2021.overview: After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana journeys alongside Maui and a new crew to the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous, long-lost waters for an adventure unlike anything she's ever faced.

2021.title: The Return
2021.overview: After twenty years away, Odysseus washes up on the shores of Ithaca, haggard and unrecognizable. The king has finally returned home, but much has changed in his kingdom since he left to fight in the Trojan war.

2021.title: Captain America: Brave New World
2021.overview: After meeting with newly elected U.S. President Thaddeus Ross, Sam finds himself in the middle of an international incident. He must discover the reason behind a nefarious global plot before the true mastermind has the entire world seeing red.

2021.title: The Gorge
2021.overview: Two highly trained operatives grow close from a distance after being sent to guard opposite sides of a mysterious gorge. When an evil below emerges, they must work together to survive what lies within.

2021.title: A Minecraft Movie
2021.overview: Four misfits find themselves struggling with ordinary problems when they are suddenly pulled through a mysterious portal into the Overworld: a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master this world while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected, expert crafter, Steve.

2021.title: Sinners
2021.overview: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

2021.title: Forgive Us All
2021.overview: In a post-apocalyptic world, a virus has transformed humans into violently deranged cannibals. A bereaved mother has lost everything and takes refuge in an isolated mountain cabin, until a desperate wounded stranger arrives with a story of hope.

2021.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
2021.overview: Ethan Hunt and team continue their search for the terrifying AI known as the Entity — which has infiltrated intelligence networks all over the globe — with the world's governments and a mysterious ghost from Hunt's past on their trail. Joined by new allies and armed with the means to shut the Entity down for good, Hunt is in a race against time to prevent the world as we know it from changing forever.

2021.title: KPop Demon Hunters
2021.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

2021.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
2021.overview: Five years after the events of Jurassic World Dominion, covert operations expert Zora Bennett is contracted to lead a skilled team on a top-secret mission to secure genetic material from the world's three most massive dinosaurs. When Zora's operation intersects with a civilian family whose boating expedition was capsized, they all find themselves stranded on an island where they come face-to-face with a sinister, shocking discovery that's been hidden from the world for decades.

2021.title: F1
2021.overview: Racing legend Sonny Hayes is coaxed out of retirement to lead a struggling Formula 1 team—and mentor a young hotshot driver—while chasing one more chance at glory.

2021.title: Superman
2021.overview: Superman, a journalist in Metropolis, embarks on a journey to reconcile his Kryptonian heritage with his human upbringing as Clark Kent.

2021.title: The Banished
2021.overview: Grace has nowhere to turn when she finds herself lost in the wilderness with a dark presence threatening to consume her in this twisted folk horror.

2021.title: The Fantastic 4: First Steps
2021.overview: Against the vibrant backdrop of a 1960s-inspired, retro-futuristic world, Marvel's First Family is forced to balance their roles as heroes with the strength of their family bond, while defending Earth from a ravenous space god called Galactus and his enigmatic Herald, Silver Surfer.

2021.title: The Bad Guys 2
2021.overview: The now-reformed Bad Guys are trying (very, very hard) to be good, but instead find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes, globe-trotting heist, masterminded by a new team of criminals they never saw coming: The Bad Girls.

2021.title: War of the Worlds
2021.overview: Will Radford is a top analyst for Homeland Security who tracks potential threats through a mass surveillance program, until one day an attack by an unknown entity leads him to question whether the government is hiding something from him... and from the rest of the world.

2021.title: Predator: Badlands
2021.overview: Cast out from his clan, a young Predator finds an unlikely ally in a damaged android and embarks on a treacherous journey in search of the ultimate adversary.

2021.title: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
2021.overview: The original Four Horsemen reunite with a new generation of illusionists to take on powerful diamond heiress Veronika Vanderberg, who leads a criminal empire built on money laundering and trafficking. The new and old magicians must overcome their differences to work together on their most ambitious heist yet.

2021.title: Zootopia 2
2021.overview: After cracking the biggest case in Zootopia's history, rookie cops Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde find themselves on the twisting trail of a great mystery when Gary De'Snake arrives and turns the animal metropolis upside down. To crack the case, Judy and Nick must go undercover to unexpected new parts of town, where their growing partnership is tested like never before.

2021.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
2021.overview: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora: the Ash People, a violent and power-hungry Na'vi tribe led by the ruthless Varang. Jake's family must fight for their survival and the future of Pandora in a conflict that pushes them to their emotional and physical limits.

2021.title: The Housemaid
2021.overview: Trying to escape her past, Millie Calloway accepts a job as a live-in housemaid for the wealthy Nina and Andrew Winchester. But what begins as a dream job quickly unravels into something far more dangerous—a sexy, seductive game of secrets, scandal, and power.

2021.title: Greenland 2: Migration
2021.overview: Having found the safety of the Greenland bunker after the comet Clarke decimated the Earth, the Garrity family must now risk everything to embark on a perilous journey across the wasteland of Europe to find a new home.

2021.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
2021.overview: Dr. Kelson finds himself in a shocking new relationship - with consequences that could change the world as they know it - and Spike's encounter with Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

2021.title: Send Help
2021.overview: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.

2021.title: Shelter
2021.overview: A man living in self-imposed exile on a remote island rescues a young girl from a violent storm, setting off a chain of events that forces him out of seclusion to protect her from enemies tied to his past.

2021.title: The Wrecking Crew
2021.overview: Estranged half-brothers Jonny and James reunite after their father's mysterious death. As they search for the truth, buried secrets reveal a conspiracy threatening to tear their family apart.

2021.title: GOAT
2021.overview: A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.

2021.title: Crime 101
2021.overview: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

2021.title: War Machine
2021.overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

2021.title: Hoppers
2021.overview: Scientists have discovered how to 'hop' human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals. Animal lover Mabel seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world beyond anything she could have imagined.

2021.title: Dolly
2021.overview: Young Macy is abducted by a deranged, monstrous figure who wants to raise her as its child.

2021.title: Sniper: No Nation
2021.overview: Brandon Beckett and Agent Zero lead a rescue mission in Costa Verde when their friends are taken hostage.

2021.title: Over Your Dead Body
2021.overview: A dysfunctional couple head to a remote cabin to "reconnect", but each has secret intentions to kill the other.

2021.title: Project Hail Mary
2021.overview: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction.

2021.title: Ready or Not: Here I Come
2021.overview: Moments after surviving an all-out attack from the Le Domas family, Grace discovers she’s reached the next level of the nightmarish game — and this time with her estranged sister Faith at her side. Grace has one chance to survive, keep her sister alive, and claim the High Seat of the Council that controls the world. Four rival families are hunting her for the throne, and whoever wins rules it all.

2021.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
2021.overview: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.

2021.title: The Drama
2021.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

2021.title: Beast
2021.overview: MMA legend Patton James, now a commercial fisherman, is pulled back into the cage when his brother is in danger. Reuniting with his old coach Sammy, he commits to one final fight in one championship against the brutal champion Xavier Grau.

2021.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
2021.overview: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

2021.title: Normal
2021.overview: An unassuming substitute sheriff with a troubled past responds to a bank robbery in a small, sleepy town and unknowingly uncovers something far more explosive.

2021.title: Michael
2021.overview: The story of Michael Jackson, one of the most influential artists the world has ever known, and his life beyond the music. His journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world, highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career.

2021.title: Apex
2021.overview: A grieving woman pushing her limits on a solo adventure in the Australian wild is ensnared in a twisted game with a cunning killer who thinks she's prey.

2021.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
2021.overview: Andy Sachs returns to Runway as Miranda Priestly navigates a new media landscape and Runway's position within. The duo reconnect with former assistant Emily Charlton, now the head of a luxury brand that possesses funding which could ensure Runway's survival.

2021.title: Hokum
2021.overview: When novelist Ohm Bauman retreats to a remote inn to scatter his parents' ashes, he is consumed by tales of a witch haunting the honeymoon suite. Disturbing visions and a shocking disappearance forces him to confront dark corners of his past.

2021.title: Deep Water
2021.overview: A group of international passengers on a flight from Los Angeles to Shanghai is forced to make an emergency landing in shark-infested waters. The terrified group is forced to work together and overcome their differences if they hope to escape their sinking plane and the frenzy of sharks drawn to the wreckage.

2021.title: The Sheep Detectives
2021.overview: George Hardy is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can't possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep realize they must become the detectives. As they follow the clues and investigate human suspects, they prove that even sheep can be brilliant crime-solvers.

2021.title: Seven Snipers
2021.overview: When a former elite sniper is hunted down by the ruthless warlord who once held her captive, she must fight to the death to protect the daughter she has raised in hiding, on a remote Australian farm.

2021.title: Swapped
2021.overview: A small woodland creature and a majestic bird, two natural sworn enemies of the Valley, magically trade places and set off on an adventure of a lifetime to switch back. Their journey soon uncovers a greater threat—one that could endanger not only their species, but the entire valley they call home.

2021.title: Mortal Kombat II
2021.overview: The fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

2021.title: Remarkably Bright Creatures
2021.overview: Through unlikely bonds formed during night shifts at a local aquarium, Tova, an elderly widow, learns of a life-changing discovery that may bring her joy and wonder once again.

2021.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
2021.overview: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight.

2021.title: Obsession
2021.overview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

2021.title: In the Grey
2021.overview: A covert team of elite operatives are living in the shadows. When a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune, they're sent to take it back—an impossible heist that erupts into a deadly game of strategy, deception and survival.

2021.title: Power Ballad
2021.overview: When Rick, a past-his-prime wedding singer, meets fading boy-band star Danny during a gig, the two bond over music and a late-night jam session. But when Danny turns one of Rick’s songs into the hit that reignites his career, Rick sets out to reclaim the recognition he believes he deserves - even if it means risking everything he cares about.

2021.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu
2021.overview: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they have enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.

2021.title: Passenger
2021.overview: After a young couple witnesses a gruesome highway accident, they soon realize they did not leave the crash scene alone, as a demonic presence called the Passenger that won't stop until it claims them both turns their van life adventure into a nightmare.

2021.title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War
2021.overview: Jack Ryan is reluctantly pulled back into espionage when an international covert mission unravels a deadly conspiracy. Racing against time, he joins CIA allies Mike November & James Greer and sharp MI6 officer Emma Marlowe to battle a rogue black-ops unit in a high-stakes, deeply personal fight.

2021.title: Saccharine
2021.overview: After succumbing to an obscure weight-loss craze involving the eating of human ashes, lovelorn medical student Hana finds herself haunted by the ghost of the person she's eating.

2021.title: Pressure
2021.overview: In the tense 72 hours before D-Day, and the fate of the free world hanging in the balance, General Dwight D. Eisenhower and Captain James Stagg face an impossible choice—launch the largest and most dangerous seaborne invasion in history or risk losing the war altogether.

2021.title: Backrooms
2021.overview: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

2021.title: The Breadwinner
2021.overview: After his wife Katie lands a once-in-a-lifetime deal on Shark Tank that takes her on a prolonged business trip - lifelong breadwinner Nate Wilcox now has to fend for his family as a first-time stay-at-home dad.

2021.title: Scary Movie
2021.overview: Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer, the Core Four are back in the killer's crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe.

2021.title: Masters of the Universe
2021.overview: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela and Duncan/Man-At-Arms, and embrace his true destiny as He-Man — the most powerful man in the universe.

2021.title: Disclosure Day
2021.overview: A cybersecurity expert becomes a whistleblower after uncovering secrets about aliens, putting him on the run from a corporation. Meanwhile, a meteorologist experiencing strange phenomena joins forces with him to prove there's life beyond our understanding.

2021.title: Stop! That! Train!
2021.overview: Best friends and train stewardesses Tess and DeeDee trade their dreary shifts on the Stank Rail for the glitzy Glamazonian Express. However, when a catastrophic Stormaganza threatens to crash the high-speed train into Celebration, Florida, the duo in coach must join forces with the snobby first-class attendants, a hot but dimwitted co-conductor, and fabulous US President Judy Gagwell to save the day.

2021.title: Toy Story 5
2021.overview: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new threat to playtime.

2021.title: Your Fault: London
2021.overview: Nick and Noah are both embarking on life-changing adventures that are threatening to pull them apart—Nick in business with his father and Noah starting a fresh chapter at Oxford University. Now living separate lives, and meeting new people, they find themselves entangled in temptations, rivalries, and betrayals and their bond is tested like never before. As secrets unravel and temptation rises, they must fight to hold onto each other—or risk losing everything.

2021.title: The Get Out
2021.overview: A nightclub owner is on the verge of leaving his dangerous past behind for retirement with his girlfriend. When masked gunmen rob him and he finds himself squeezed by ruthless cartels, a mysterious newcomer arrives with an interest in buying the business. With danger closing in from all sides, he must navigate a deadly web of deception, power, and survival  -  where escape may no longer be an option.

2021.title: Little Brother
2021.overview: A tightly wound realtor's picture-perfect life gets an extreme makeover when his lovably chaotic "little brother" suddenly reappears.

2021.title: The Death of Robin Hood
2021.overview: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chance at salvation.

2021.title: Girls Like Girls
2021.overview: Coley, 17, from rural Oregon, navigates intimacy after her mother's passing. Meeting Sonya sparks new feelings, but self-doubt hinders their connection. Sonya, unfamiliar with dating girls, is uncertain. They learn to embrace emotions.

2021.title: Citizen Vigilante
2021.overview: A man takes justice into his own hands, hunting down criminals. His vigilante crusade makes him a social media star but puts him at odds with the local police chief.

2021.title: Voicemails for Isabelle
2021.overview: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.

2021.title: Supergirl
2021.overview: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

2021.title: Minions & Monsters
2021.overview: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

2021.title: Black Box
2021.overview: A routine domestic flight turns into the flight from hell through a series of inexplicable phenomena and raw terror. Surreal encounters blur the boundaries between reality and nightmare. Passengers fight against all the odds in an attempt to survive while combating bizarre technological malfunctions, accelerating supernatural events and alien influences.

2021.title: The Invite
2021.overview: Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

2021.title: Enola Holmes 3
2021.overview: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

2021.title: Night of the Living Dead
2021.overview: A ragtag group barricade themselves in an old Pennsylvania farmhouse to remain safe from a horde of flesh-eating ghouls ravaging the Northeast.

2021.title: Simpsley
2021.overview: When penniless con-artist Marge Bouvier is sent to Italy to convince wealthy sap Seymour Skinner to come home, she’s tempted by the trappings of his affluent lifestyle. But there’s a big fat fly in the ointment: Skinner’s clingy, dim-witted mooch of a houseguest, Homer Simpsley. Lies, lust and Italian lira are abound.

2021.title: Evil Dead Burn
2021.overview: After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession. As her in-laws transform one by one into creatures that feed on fear, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life survive even in death.

2021.title: Moana
2021.overview: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.

2021.title: Heartstopper Forever
2021.overview: It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

2021.title: The Odyssey
2021.overview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters, and trials that stretch both his cunning and his humanity to the breaking point.

2021.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland
2021.overview: Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a new villain — Maddox Hatter. When Maddox captures the Queen of Hearts, Red and Chloe must work alongside Red’s new sister Pink, Luisa Madrigal’s son Luis, and Maddox’s son Max to save her and Wonderland.

2022.title: The Batman
2022.overview: In his second year of fighting crime, Batman uncovers corruption in Gotham City that connects to his own family while facing a serial killer known as the Riddler.

2022.title: Top Gun: Maverick
2022.overview: After more than thirty years of service as one of the Navy’s top aviators, and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him, Pete “Maverick” Mitchell finds himself training a detachment of TOP GUN graduates for a specialized mission the likes of which no living pilot has ever seen.

2022.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
2022.overview: Set more than a decade after the events of the first film, learn the story of the Sully family (Jake, Neytiri, and their kids), the trouble that follows them, the lengths they go to keep each other safe, the battles they fight to stay alive, and the tragedies they endure.

2022.title: Always
2022.overview: A traumatized teen spends the week at her grandmother's new house and discovers its horrific secret.

2022.title: The Hanged
2022.overview: Eight guests, all strangers to one another, are invited to a secluded location by their gracious, yet enigmatic host. Isolated from the rest of civilization, things start to go awry when each of them is accused of a heinous crime. As they begin to doubt one another and their motives, they realize they are being hunted one by one. Will any of them make it out alive?

2022.title: Amortal
2022.overview: In 2019, a medical company known as Coil Industries begins human trials of the controversial Amortal program. Aimed to have their cells replaced by self-replicating nanites, the two candidates, Jordan and Cass experience how becoming next stage of human evolution will affect them and others.

2022.title: Cameron
2022.overview: Trouble is never far for a stripper as she works to make ends meet while frequently having to ward off the dangers her sketchy career brings.

2022.title: Dead Weight
2022.overview: When Damon and Jason find an unexpected surprise in the trunk of their drug drop car, their lives begin to reveal themselves from the inside out.

2022.title: Museum Keepers
2022.overview: At a wake, Noah and Mia go out for some fresh air.

2022.title: First Footing
2022.overview: Paul wakes up from a wild New Year's Eve, with little memory of the night before spent at his Mum's social club. When it's revealed that the prize money from the Annual New Year's Eve Karaoke Competition has gone missing Paul fears his good name and reputation are at stake. This whodunnit parody gets to the bottom of a crime where everybody is a suspect.

2022.title: Journey of Eternity
2022.overview: After his beloved fiancé was forcibly taken away, Esho, a school teacher, is falsely accused of committing a crime and gets thrown in an Iraqi prison. While in prison, he witnesses the unjust execution of three activists who become heroes in their martyrdom for defending the human rights of the indigenous Assyrian people in the Middle East. Upon his prison release, Esho vows to honor the martyrs' courage and sacrifice by journeying the world to share their stories. Ultimately, he gains international attention when he meets an American journalist, William Cooper, a representative of the United Nations Human Rights Organization.

2022.title: The Impostor
2022.overview: Trapped in the apartment of her estranged boyfriend, a young woman's self-esteem crisis is made worse by the arrival of her helpless, terrified doppelgänger.

2022.title: ALP
2022.overview: A strange force called "ALP" has created the perfect utopia. Most citizens have peacefully ascended into a virtual mountain realm, only few remained in the real world. Things begin to change as a curious woman returns from the mountainscape into the real world.  This surreal short film was initially written to be the pilot episode for a mini series.

2022.title: Dendam Hantu Latah
2022.overview: Sinopsis Dendam Hantu Latah  Tells the story of Aris, a teenage boy who was lashing out and was mistaken for dead by his village people. The commotion started when the villagers thought Haris was a ghost who was bothering them.

2022.title: Paranormal Raw
2022.overview: This U.K.-based Paranormal investigation documentary features Matt Long and the South East Paranormal Team investigating the West Five Bar in Ealing, London, with special celebrity guest Mutya Buena of British girl band The Sugababes.

2022.title: The Deal
2022.overview: A mother fights to save her ailing daughter after a global pandemic worse than any seen before ravaged the planet, leaving resources so scarce you must pay for them with your life.

2022.title: Valedictory
2022.overview: 'Valedictory' tells the story of two contrasting secret agents - 'Douglas' and 'Jonathan' - who are on the run from a sinister life insurance company after an undercover mission at the facility resulted in their identities being discovered. The head of this organisation is a young, ruthless and sociopathic man named 'Ryan' who is doing everything in his power to make sure that they are captured and returned to him.

2022.title: Twin Flame
2022.overview: After seeking spiritual council, a disillusioned young woman scavenges the misty landscapes of northwestern America in search of her twin flame.

2022.title: Cowtown
2022.overview: Jamie navigates his senior year of high school while being cared for by his unstable brother. Cowtown is a fresh take on the classic, high school, coming of age story.  While the film takes place in a gritty reality, there is always a scent of the mystical in the air.  Cowtown isn't quite what it seems.

2022.title: New Year's Eve Concert 2022 With the Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra
2022.overview: Under the baton of Kirill Petrenko, the Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra's traditional New Year's Eve concert brings you an enchanting programme led by star tenor Jonas Kaufmann. A delightful medley of Verdi, Prokofiev, Nino Rota, Tchaikovsky and more.

2022.title: Inventor Crazybrains and the Girl Called Bird
2022.overview: The objects found inside the house seemed of little historical importance - two diaries. But taken together, they form a fantastical little story… and so a filmmaker finds herself caught between fiction and memory, believing in impossibilities.

2022.title: 25 Cents per Minute
2022.overview: Anthology drama following six characters on their journey for connection, seen through the lens of the last remaining payphones in Los Angeles.

2022.title: Albert & Claude
2022.overview: When he's left behind by his fellow settlers, Claude searches for the Fountain of Youth with Albert, the expedition's former leader, whom he killed…

2022.title: Empty Canvas
2022.overview: A social media celebrity gets kidnapped and is forced to make a viral video in a desert, where he tries to rebuild his estranged relationship with his father through Chinese calligraphy.

2022.title: Roam
2022.overview: Suffering injuries at the hands of Native American forces, two buffalo hunters set camp near enemy territory and try to survive the night.

2022.title: Blue Square Heart
2022.overview: A drag queen is forced to reconsider his shockingly violent art when his estranged, conservative mother makes a surprise appearance at his show in an attempt to reconnect.

2022.title: Anthology of nine souls on their way to death
2022.overview: Andy the night watch was the cemetery gate keeper in Spoon river. He was overseeing the burial of all Spoon river residents. He was the silent observer of life in the small town, knowing everyone and their lives. He could see the good and bad, usually as they were intermixed after death. Having been given a final say following their passing, the bodies have a different story of their lies, cheating, corruption and neglect and Andy is shedding light to the underlying truth of the events.

2022.title: Best of Showtime Boxing 2022
2022.overview: Highlights from 2022's knockouts and fights; featuring Gervonta Davis, Errol Spence Jr., Jake Paul, Jermell Charlo, David Benavidez, Sebastian Fundora and more.

2022.title: Those Who Kept the Light / Seaweed
2022.overview: Those Who Kept the Light is a project loosely based on stories of female lighthouse keepers in Scandinavia. The project explores our co-dependent relationship to the sea in context of queer and feminist maritime narratives. The narratives are often told through the voices and context of more-than human others, such as the wind, a prawn or a lighthouse. The sea, the wind, the ocean are seen as entities with consciousness and a voice. Within the wider framework of climate emergency and the role of the fragile ecosystems of the ocean, the project explores the collective mind-set of imagination, hope and imagined spaces of solace and power through and within epic and barren Nordic landscape.

2022.title: Broken
2022.overview: A teenage girl flees her home after enduring years of abuse from her deranged father.

2022.title: Ndhlovu
2022.overview: Shot in South Africa’s Kruger National Park, this film claims the biggest threat to elephants are animal rights activists and elephants themselves.

2022.title: The Chosen One
2022.overview: After impulsively shaving off his beard and sidelocks, a young Hasidic man experiences a nightmarish transformation that leads him right back to where he started. Over the course of one painful night, Eli Eisenstein will come to realize that it’s much easier to shave your beard than to shed who you are.

2022.title: The Four Prong Approach
2022.overview: The Four Prong Approach follows a young inventor who attempts to bring forks into a fork-less world.

2022.title: Beyond the White Veil
2022.overview: Set in the Middle Ages, a witch named Morgan le Fay is banished from her coven when she breaks a rule that results in a deadly curse falling upon her. She sets off to find the only wizard capable of saving her.

2022.title: John and Linda
2022.overview: Linda brings her lover Derrick back to her house for an intimate evening, only to discover her husband John is home waiting for them.

2022.title: Witness 2: The Crime
2022.overview: A sequel to Witness to the Crime that revisits its events from the perspective of a new protagonist.

2022.title: Phish 2022-12-31 Madison Square Garden, New York, NY
2022.overview: SET 1: Tweezer, Halley's Comet -> Set Your Soul Free > Rift, Cavern > Tweezer > Shade, Mike's Song > I Am Hydrogen > Weekapaug Groove  SET 2: Say It To Me S.A.N.T.O.S. > Also Sprach Zarathustra > Kill Devil Falls, Mercury > Light -> Waste, Drift While You're Sleeping, Backwards Down the Number Line  SET 3: Ghost[1] > Bohemian Rhapsody[2] > Ghost -> Jungle Boogie[3] > Wilson[4] > Auld Lang Syne[3] > Carini[5] > Theme from New York, New York[6] > Tweezer > Prince Caspian > Crosseyed and Painless > Piper, A Life Beyond The Dream, First Tube  ENCORE: Show of Life > Tweezer Reprise[7]

2022.title: Hashtag Blessed: The Movie
2022.overview: It's Christmastime and Jessi is all but excited. She finds herself with comparisonitis in the world of social media. Other women her age just seem to "have it all", while she is frustrated over her job at the local movie theater, and drowning in student loan debt. Her Grandma and friends seem to be concerned for her health and well being, and only want Jessi to be happy.

2022.title: Lizzo: Live in Concert
2022.overview: Celebrate the new year with award-winning superstar Lizzo, her band The Lizzbians and The Little Bigs, The Big Grrrls with special guests Cardi B, SZA and Missy Elliott for a spectacular show filled with lots of love, positivity and incredible music.

2022.title: EMD at 100
2022.overview: For a century, EMD has built the majority of diesel locomotives in North America and the world. Noted videographer Rich Luckin looks at this builder's origins, growth and development, supremacy, and its role today as an arm of Progress Rail. This documentary  includes the history of EMD, exclusive footage at the Indiana plant, many interviews with employees, and more!

2022.title: Ooh the Banter!
2022.overview: Jack Docherty brings together a jam-packed cast of comedians, actors and famous faces for a riotous celebration of Scotland's most valuable export – its sense of humour. Scotland is a small nation with a big funny bone. It's known the world over for self-deprecation, quick-witted patter and deadpan asides. But what makes it so funny? To find out the answer, this programme delves deep into the BBC Scotland archives to find a century’s worth of classic characters, catchphrases and comedy clips.

2022.title: Merit x Zoe
2022.overview: Merit and Zoe are battle buddies on a remote US Army outpost in Afghanistan. Back home, something comes between them that will put their once-in-a-lifetime friendship to the test.

2022.title: Lake time
2022.overview: Through digital manipulation, this experiments with light and color distortions of the digital image of a glistening body of water. lake time finds visual beauty in the digitally altered and the analogue alike.

2022.title: Chameleon Law
2022.overview: A found faded set of vermillion 35mm slides—evidence of time and change. Their red hues transform the slides’ subjects—mountain landscapes of the West, long-span bridges, tourists and tourist sites—into simultaneously sublime and corrosive views. In Chameleon Law, these time-altered images, alternately depleted and extreme, suggest a heated landscape of the past and future.

2022.title: A Poem About Exile,
2022.overview: A Poem About Exile unfolds as a collective manifesto. Via fluid dance movements, evocative verses of poetry, and the ethereal melodies of electronic music, diaspora Uyghur artists weave a tapestry of their shared experiences of pain and yearning for a home.

2022.title: The Revenge of Ebaad
2022.overview: A wealthy chartered accountant's quiet existence is shattered by the untimely arrival of a beguiling latin stranger, leading to a confrontation that will shake him to the core. Search YouTube for: The Revenge of Ebaad and watch free today!

2022.title: Best of Stand-Up 2022
2022.overview: From Bill Burr to Ali Wong, Gabriel Iglesias to Trevor Noah, Taylor Tomlinson to Jo Koy, check out the best jokes from Netflix’s 2022 stand-up specials.

2022.title: Alien Chronicles: Interdimensional UFOs
2022.overview: Throughout the world there are numerous ancient sites that are considered to be Stargates, Portals or Doorways to other realities. Stories of people traveling forward and back in time have often stirred the imagination but could some of these stories be true? The latest discoveries by NASA and independent physicists have revealed that portals do exist along with other realities that we have been unaware of and with the recent fascinating footage caught by military pilots of unknown crafts, some experts theorize that these UFOs are jumping in and out of our reality and are doing so from certain locations on our planet.

2022.title: Alabama Rose
2022.overview: In a tourist town, you never know who might visit but tourists are the life blood of the economy. Learning to live life again, a local woman left widowed by the mysterious murder of her husband, tries modeling for photographers with the encouragement of friends. Common suspicions arise about their motives. Its flattering and sometimes paid work, but who can she trust? Is it safe to be alone? She lives remotely with constant concern she is being watched. Local law enforcement is challenged to be supportive but not spend their time chasing sounds. The strong willed Mary is slow to warm up to dating, causing an impatient admirer to lash out but Mary isn't one to surrender to a challenge.

2022.title: Celebrations
2022.overview: A waitress working at a vacant, overnight diner tries to write an apology note to her sister. Her night is interfered with when a lost old man enters the restaurant.

2022.title: Terror Train 2
2022.overview: A year has passed since a series of gruesome murders took the lives of multiple college seniors aboard the now infamous Terror Train. The survivors are coerced to go on a New Year's Eve redemption ride aboard the very same train, where a new kind of evil awaits and the terrified passengers must once again fight to survive the ride.

2022.title: Sights & Sounds of the 150th Tunbridge World's Fair
2022.overview: It's easy to spend some leisure time at the idyllic, homely Tunbridge World's Fair. The biggest little fair around!

2022.title: Love Works: A Story of Healing and Hope
2022.overview: Faced with his father’s explosive temper and impossible expectations, Chris walks away from a pro golf career to follow a calling to the ministry.

2022.title: Farrokh Ghaffari: the centenary
2022.overview: Short documentary on Farrokh Ghaffari

2022.title: Final Curtain Call
2022.overview: A gifted young organist struggles to endure the violent world around him.

2022.title: Welcome to Balkan
2022.overview: What happens when to the Balkans, famous for its hospitality, witty and resourceful inhabitants, comes a stranger determined to find the love of his life? Of course, nothing is predictable here, not even in this hilarious comedy in which the least expected characters and situations will appear! What the true Balkan soul, nature and humor are, will be seen in this spectacular film where nothing is as it seems, entangles and unravels. In the galaxy of famous actors, you will also see people you would not expect to recognize. Which ones? Well, welcome to the Balkans, everything's possible there!

2022.title: 4EVER
2022.overview: A young woman moves in with her girlfriend but is haunted by the memories of a past relationship;

2022.title: Ang Motel
2022.overview: A young woman shares her motel room with an elderly Filipina woman when she is stranded in a sleepy beach town.

2022.title: Tarlan
2022.overview: A village teenager who, in the course of common events, gets stuck with the beliefs and some superstitions of the villagers

2022.title: Forever as the End – Fate
2022.overview: Following Kristallnacht in 1938, Ulrich Ollendorff’s family flees Berlin as to avoid the horrific destiny shared by six and a half million Jews who were killed in the Holocaust. Within only a few years, he becomes one of the most well respected and famous ophthalmologists in New York City.

2022.title: Green Pools
2022.overview: When her mother dies, Khadra embarks on a journey to bring her nephew Sammy to  the funeral.

2022.title: The Turtle and The Hare
2022.overview: A different take on Aesop's fable "The Turtle and The Hare".

2022.title: Shadow
2022.overview: Ritwik, a man in his mid-thirties, is caught in a quagmire between his past and his present. As a result of which he often zones out from everyday life. This has deeply strained his relationship with his wife, Vidya, who believes that this is disdain directed towards her. Within this chaos, Ritwik finds solace in the snippets he captures of his daily life on his handycam.

2022.title: AnGst
2022.overview: A socially awkward teen with a stutter battles depression until circumstances fail him with drastic consequences.

2022.title: Annie
2022.overview: Annie who just lost her unborn child runs into a mysterious homeless guy one night. Little did she knew that encounter was about to change her life forever.

2022.title: A Cloudy Moon
2022.overview: Nick is looking forward to reuniting with his best friend from High School, but regrets a slip of the tongue on a phone call he wants to take back.

2022.title: Children in Naturism
2022.overview: Interviews and discussions about children in naturism.

2022.title: Flitsbezorgd
2022.overview: With the arrival of flash delivery people, our groceries are now at the door within 10 minutes, but Dolf takes a very different approach during his performance. In a 100-minute show, he tries to make chocolate of the turbulent year 2022. From the lockdown we ended up in a European war and other transgressive behavior. After a slutty summer 2.0, another World Cup will follow where you wouldn't put your forced laborers to work yet. And then we haven't even mentioned the countless unexpected events that will pass by in the coming months. Enough to discuss!

2022.title: Reset
2022.overview: After falling in love with a brilliant scientist, a closeted gay military chaplain meets his father, a prominent pastor, so he can finally come out. When things take a deadly turn, will the pastor make a decision that goes against everything he believes?

2022.title: Miley's New Year's Eve Party
2022.overview: Live from Miami, multi-platinum-selling superstar Miley Cyrus is back with the legendary Dolly Parton to host a star-studded evening full of amazing surprises, incredible performances and more as they ring in the New Year.

2022.title: BEAKS
2022.overview: On the night of her birthday, a young woman is stalked by strangers in plague doctor masks.

2022.title: RPG Kids
2022.overview: In 1982, the war had spread to the Palestinian-Lebanese border, and the Israeli colonizers entered the Rashidiya camp in southern Lebanon. There, a number of young children were waiting for them. They were cubs of the Palestinian revolution, carrying RPG weapons and fighting the Zionist enemy.  In this film, the director follows these children nearly 40 years after that anniversary.

2022.title: Movie Theatres: Light & Sound
2022.overview: Art-house cinema is dying. Many Independent theatres sit vacant as would-be patrons amble past extinguished marquees. At night, they come to life. The lights, the popcorn, the magic of the cinema. But in the age of "home streaming", is this experience enough? Only you, the viewer, can decide.

2022.title: Audition Tape 13
2022.overview: An independent film director casting for his new movie encounters a young actress who is prepared to turn the audition back on him.

2022.title: Blink Twice
2022.overview: Two friends enter a mysterious house to play an ominous and dangerous card game for cash with a disturbing entity.

2022.title: At the Mercy of Poseidon
2022.overview: A man & a boy are adrift in the Atlantic, forsaken to the wrath of the ocean & its deities.

2022.title: lovertits
2022.overview: Ayanna Dozier assumes the character of a young woman who enters a love motel to re-train her emotions about love and sex in lovertits, a 4-minute film inspired in part by Charles Matton’s French erotica movie Spermula. In this version, the woman, who is seen bathing in a bikini in a heart-shaped bath, unsuccessfully attempts to embrace “superficial happiness, femininity and passiveness.” This film is part of the trilogy, "Close, but no Cigar." [Overview Courtesy of Ayanna Dozier]

2022.title: The Distance Between Staircase and the Sky
2022.overview: Ascending a staircase in the centre of Athens makes room for reflection on everyday life, as both otherworldly and mundane. On a planet lit by neon and on a beach powered by cicadas, we twirl into a void measured by walking – one step at a time.

2022.title: A Little Chilli
2022.overview: A story about motherhood and connection. About how we choose to honour and remember those who are no longer with us – and those who still are. A story about food, and the rituals that unite us.

2022.title: So to Speak, Light
2022.overview: A meditation on life as it continues after loss, So to Speak, Light hesitantly welcomes viewers into the world of filmmaker Wonwoon Kim as he journeys home to South Korea from France to attend his grandmother’s funeral. Simple memories of his now-deceased grandparents speckle the film as Wonwoo aimlessly wanders through the day-to-day routine in his hometown. Ruminating on light, photography, family resemblance, return, and the ability for film to capture more than a moment, Wonwoo asks: How should we endure? This film, a collection of now, is his answer.

2022.title: No Man Like Me
2022.overview: So you're bicurious.... Big deal. Get online, you can be sucking dick or getting fucked within an hour - if that's what you really want to do. It's one of the easiest things on earth to do. ...But instead you're here with me. Let's explore why that is.

2022.title: Bivalve
2022.overview: In Calbuco, an island south of Chile, Ana (30), a single mother, works as a worker in a seafood factory. Her daily life changes when she is sexually violated by her boss. Ana tries to hide the pain from her son while she takes care of him. The harsh winter is gone and the sun shines directly into Ana's eyes again.

2022.title: Lucy Didn't Say Goodbye
2022.overview: A short film.

2022.title: Will Faith Do Us Part?
2022.overview: Christian couples deal with the challenges of a spouse who is devoted to Jesus, yet also has different beliefs and practices from their own.

2022.title: Bastard's Brood
2022.overview: An epic silent film depicting the tumultuous clash between twin brothers Opus Sun and Magnum Crassus.

2022.title: Tommy
2022.overview: Desperation drives a recovering addict to seek out his estranged brother at their secluded family home.

2022.title: Zora
2022.overview: Living in one of the more dangerous suburbs of Port-au-Prince, Zora is a young orphan who fights for her life and that of her little brother, threated by the gangs in the area who killed their father Jacob, a former journalist.

2022.title: The Fish Women of Victoria Lake
2022.overview: Amidst the shimmering expanse of Lake Victoria, Esther and Jessica, two brave sisters and young mothers, defy convention and danger by becoming fisherwomen. While the law dictates the use of large nets, their steep prices force these resilient sisters to resort to affordable but illicit small nets. Every cast of their net is a dance with death, as government soldiers patrol tirelessly, their bullets ready to silence any transgressor. For the sisters, this perilous existence is a desperate means to an end - a lifeline for their families in a world bound by poverty and unforgiving rules.

2022.title: no one saw me standing there
2022.overview: Assembled with ghostly texture, a messenger sends a note through time.

2022.title: White Screen (for Amy Halpern)
2022.overview: "White Screen starts with the idea that perception is a worldmaking ability. It is simple: a change in the lens’ focus can either allow us to see a tree or a forest, and brings an understanding that these two things exist simultaneously. Then we see a woman (Martos) tying a rope between the trees. Slowly, she makes a cinema space materialize, as she drapes a sheet over the rope. While the night takes its time to fall, the film explores the screen as a new part of the landscape (perhaps something that exists between the tree and the forest) ..." — Lucía Salas

2022.title: Birthday Cake
2022.overview: A family grieves the death of their son while eating the child's birthday cake.

2022.title: About James
2022.overview: Marlene’s chance encounter with James at a bookstore, 50 years since their last meeting, brings back painful memories of a love lost. Is there a “second chance”?

2022.title: Once Upon a Time in the Wasteland
2022.overview: A bounty hunter in a post apocalyptic wasteland is hired to track down an outlaw. But he's not the only one out looking for her, and the job is nothing like he expected.

2022.title: Sam Ryder Rocks New Year’s Eve
2022.overview: Sam Ryder is joined by fellow music stars to put on a spectacular New Year’s Eve party.

2022.title: Aunt Linda
2022.overview: A boy hides in the back of his mother’s car and films an unwanted hitchhiker’s torturous occupation.

2022.title: Pounds of Matter
2022.overview: A kaleidoscopic perspective into one woman's experience with self-dissolution and urban alienation.

2022.title: The Ballad of Maddog Quinn
2022.overview: An unlikely outlaw wreaks hell across the dusty dystopia of The State on a wild quest to save what is held most dear, but things aren’t always what they seem on the desolate wasteland frontier.

2022.title: Caldo
2022.overview: The story is about the friendship between Erik and a dog named Caldo. Caldo is a loyal dog to his owner. In this film, it is told that Erik becomes impoverished and has no one to keep him company. So, only Caldo remains as his friend. Erik always tries to give the best to Caldo, such as providing food and caring for Caldo with full affection.  When they are tired, they can only rest in a small place like a small post. After some time, Caldo goes missing, and Erik's feelings are chaotic and confused about where to search for Caldo. In short, after searching for Caldo everywhere, Erik finds Caldo with his neck covered in blood.

2022.title: I Need to Tell You Something
2022.overview: A short fiction/experimental film that through absurdity and repetition explores communication, relationships, and the existential absurdity of human connection.

2022.title: For Joy
2022.overview: A young adventurer sets out to share the joy she has found. But it will be difficult to convince her father that spending all his hard-earned money was well worth it.

2022.title: Hell Comes Frozen
2022.overview: Two men split from the same atom of evil face off at the edge of the universe.

2022.title: Let's Make Love and Listen to Death from Above
2022.overview: Shot on both b&w and color film stock, the 5-minute “Let’s Make Love and Listen to Death from Above” re-animates “illicit” trades that took place, emphasizing the “desire and affect that still roam and haunt the Chelsea District.” [Overview Courtesy of Microscope Gallery]

2022.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
2022.overview: While working underground to fix a water main, Brooklyn plumbers—and brothers—Mario and Luigi are transported down a mysterious pipe and wander into a magical new world. But when the brothers are separated, Mario embarks on an epic quest to find Luigi.

2022.title: Evil Dead Rise
2022.overview: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

2022.title: Fast X
2022.overview: Over many missions and against impossible odds, Dom Toretto and his family have outsmarted, out-nerved and outdriven every foe in their path. Now, they confront the most lethal opponent they've ever faced: A terrifying threat emerging from the shadows of the past who's fueled by blood revenge, and who is determined to shatter this family and destroy everything—and everyone—that Dom loves, forever.

2022.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
2022.overview: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn’s full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters the Spider Society, a team of Spider-People charged with protecting the Multiverse's very existence. But when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders and must set out on his own to save those he loves most.

2022.title: Oppenheimer
2022.overview: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.

2022.title: Graphic Desires
2022.overview: When reclusive Franklin cheats on his partner with a mysterious girl he meets on a dating app, it becomes the start of a deadly obsession.

2022.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
2022.overview: Black Manta seeks revenge on Aquaman for his father's death. Wielding the Black Trident's power, he becomes a formidable foe. To defend Atlantis, Arthur (Aquaman) forges an alliance with his imprisoned brother. They must protect the kingdom.

2022.title: Dune: Part Two
2022.overview: Follow the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a path of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, Paul endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

2022.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
2022.overview: A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life with his days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. But when his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctant Wolverine.

2022.title: The Wild Robot
2022.overview: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz is stranded on an uninhabited island. To survive the harsh environment, Roz bonds with the island's animals and cares for an orphaned baby goose.

2022.title: Moana 2
2022.overview: After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana journeys alongside Maui and a new crew to the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous, long-lost waters for an adventure unlike anything she's ever faced.

2022.title: The Return
2022.overview: After twenty years away, Odysseus washes up on the shores of Ithaca, haggard and unrecognizable. The king has finally returned home, but much has changed in his kingdom since he left to fight in the Trojan war.

2022.title: Captain America: Brave New World
2022.overview: After meeting with newly elected U.S. President Thaddeus Ross, Sam finds himself in the middle of an international incident. He must discover the reason behind a nefarious global plot before the true mastermind has the entire world seeing red.

2022.title: The Gorge
2022.overview: Two highly trained operatives grow close from a distance after being sent to guard opposite sides of a mysterious gorge. When an evil below emerges, they must work together to survive what lies within.

2022.title: A Minecraft Movie
2022.overview: Four misfits find themselves struggling with ordinary problems when they are suddenly pulled through a mysterious portal into the Overworld: a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master this world while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected, expert crafter, Steve.

2022.title: Sinners
2022.overview: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

2022.title: Forgive Us All
2022.overview: In a post-apocalyptic world, a virus has transformed humans into violently deranged cannibals. A bereaved mother has lost everything and takes refuge in an isolated mountain cabin, until a desperate wounded stranger arrives with a story of hope.

2022.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
2022.overview: Ethan Hunt and team continue their search for the terrifying AI known as the Entity — which has infiltrated intelligence networks all over the globe — with the world's governments and a mysterious ghost from Hunt's past on their trail. Joined by new allies and armed with the means to shut the Entity down for good, Hunt is in a race against time to prevent the world as we know it from changing forever.

2022.title: KPop Demon Hunters
2022.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

2022.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
2022.overview: Five years after the events of Jurassic World Dominion, covert operations expert Zora Bennett is contracted to lead a skilled team on a top-secret mission to secure genetic material from the world's three most massive dinosaurs. When Zora's operation intersects with a civilian family whose boating expedition was capsized, they all find themselves stranded on an island where they come face-to-face with a sinister, shocking discovery that's been hidden from the world for decades.

2022.title: F1
2022.overview: Racing legend Sonny Hayes is coaxed out of retirement to lead a struggling Formula 1 team—and mentor a young hotshot driver—while chasing one more chance at glory.

2022.title: Superman
2022.overview: Superman, a journalist in Metropolis, embarks on a journey to reconcile his Kryptonian heritage with his human upbringing as Clark Kent.

2022.title: The Banished
2022.overview: Grace has nowhere to turn when she finds herself lost in the wilderness with a dark presence threatening to consume her in this twisted folk horror.

2022.title: The Fantastic 4: First Steps
2022.overview: Against the vibrant backdrop of a 1960s-inspired, retro-futuristic world, Marvel's First Family is forced to balance their roles as heroes with the strength of their family bond, while defending Earth from a ravenous space god called Galactus and his enigmatic Herald, Silver Surfer.

2022.title: The Bad Guys 2
2022.overview: The now-reformed Bad Guys are trying (very, very hard) to be good, but instead find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes, globe-trotting heist, masterminded by a new team of criminals they never saw coming: The Bad Girls.

2022.title: War of the Worlds
2022.overview: Will Radford is a top analyst for Homeland Security who tracks potential threats through a mass surveillance program, until one day an attack by an unknown entity leads him to question whether the government is hiding something from him... and from the rest of the world.

2022.title: Predator: Badlands
2022.overview: Cast out from his clan, a young Predator finds an unlikely ally in a damaged android and embarks on a treacherous journey in search of the ultimate adversary.

2022.title: The Running Man
2022.overview: Desperate to save his sick daughter, working-class Ben Richards is convinced by The Running Man's charming but ruthless producer to enter the deadly competition game as a last resort. But Ben's defiance, instincts, and grit turn him into an unexpected fan favorite — and a threat to the entire system. As ratings skyrocket, so does the danger, and Ben must outwit not just the Hunters, but a nation addicted to watching him fall.

2022.title: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
2022.overview: The original Four Horsemen reunite with a new generation of illusionists to take on powerful diamond heiress Veronika Vanderberg, who leads a criminal empire built on money laundering and trafficking. The new and old magicians must overcome their differences to work together on their most ambitious heist yet.

2022.title: Zootopia 2
2022.overview: After cracking the biggest case in Zootopia's history, rookie cops Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde find themselves on the twisting trail of a great mystery when Gary De'Snake arrives and turns the animal metropolis upside down. To crack the case, Judy and Nick must go undercover to unexpected new parts of town, where their growing partnership is tested like never before.

2022.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
2022.overview: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora: the Ash People, a violent and power-hungry Na'vi tribe led by the ruthless Varang. Jake's family must fight for their survival and the future of Pandora in a conflict that pushes them to their emotional and physical limits.

2022.title: The Housemaid
2022.overview: Trying to escape her past, Millie Calloway accepts a job as a live-in housemaid for the wealthy Nina and Andrew Winchester. But what begins as a dream job quickly unravels into something far more dangerous—a sexy, seductive game of secrets, scandal, and power.

2022.title: Greenland 2: Migration
2022.overview: Having found the safety of the Greenland bunker after the comet Clarke decimated the Earth, the Garrity family must now risk everything to embark on a perilous journey across the wasteland of Europe to find a new home.

2022.title: The Rip
2022.overview: Trust frays when a team of Miami cops discovers millions in cash inside a run-down stash house, calling everyone — and everything — into question.

2022.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
2022.overview: Dr. Kelson finds himself in a shocking new relationship - with consequences that could change the world as they know it - and Spike's encounter with Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

2022.title: Send Help
2022.overview: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.

2022.title: Shelter
2022.overview: A man living in self-imposed exile on a remote island rescues a young girl from a violent storm, setting off a chain of events that forces him out of seclusion to protect her from enemies tied to his past.

2022.title: The Wrecking Crew
2022.overview: Estranged half-brothers Jonny and James reunite after their father's mysterious death. As they search for the truth, buried secrets reveal a conspiracy threatening to tear their family apart.

2022.title: GOAT
2022.overview: A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.

2022.title: Crime 101
2022.overview: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

2022.title: War Machine
2022.overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

2022.title: Hoppers
2022.overview: Scientists have discovered how to 'hop' human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals. Animal lover Mabel seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world beyond anything she could have imagined.

2022.title: Dolly
2022.overview: Young Macy is abducted by a deranged, monstrous figure who wants to raise her as its child.

2022.title: Sniper: No Nation
2022.overview: Brandon Beckett and Agent Zero lead a rescue mission in Costa Verde when their friends are taken hostage.

2022.title: Over Your Dead Body
2022.overview: A dysfunctional couple head to a remote cabin to "reconnect", but each has secret intentions to kill the other.

2022.title: Project Hail Mary
2022.overview: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction.

2022.title: Ready or Not: Here I Come
2022.overview: Moments after surviving an all-out attack from the Le Domas family, Grace discovers she’s reached the next level of the nightmarish game — and this time with her estranged sister Faith at her side. Grace has one chance to survive, keep her sister alive, and claim the High Seat of the Council that controls the world. Four rival families are hunting her for the throne, and whoever wins rules it all.

2022.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
2022.overview: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.

2022.title: The Drama
2022.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

2022.title: Beast
2022.overview: MMA legend Patton James, now a commercial fisherman, is pulled back into the cage when his brother is in danger. Reuniting with his old coach Sammy, he commits to one final fight in one championship against the brutal champion Xavier Grau.

2022.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
2022.overview: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

2022.title: Normal
2022.overview: An unassuming substitute sheriff with a troubled past responds to a bank robbery in a small, sleepy town and unknowingly uncovers something far more explosive.

2022.title: Michael
2022.overview: The story of Michael Jackson, one of the most influential artists the world has ever known, and his life beyond the music. His journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world, highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career.

2022.title: Apex
2022.overview: A grieving woman pushing her limits on a solo adventure in the Australian wild is ensnared in a twisted game with a cunning killer who thinks she's prey.

2022.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
2022.overview: Andy Sachs returns to Runway as Miranda Priestly navigates a new media landscape and Runway's position within. The duo reconnect with former assistant Emily Charlton, now the head of a luxury brand that possesses funding which could ensure Runway's survival.

2022.title: Hokum
2022.overview: When novelist Ohm Bauman retreats to a remote inn to scatter his parents' ashes, he is consumed by tales of a witch haunting the honeymoon suite. Disturbing visions and a shocking disappearance forces him to confront dark corners of his past.

2022.title: Deep Water
2022.overview: A group of international passengers on a flight from Los Angeles to Shanghai is forced to make an emergency landing in shark-infested waters. The terrified group is forced to work together and overcome their differences if they hope to escape their sinking plane and the frenzy of sharks drawn to the wreckage.

2022.title: The Sheep Detectives
2022.overview: George Hardy is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can't possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep realize they must become the detectives. As they follow the clues and investigate human suspects, they prove that even sheep can be brilliant crime-solvers.

2022.title: Seven Snipers
2022.overview: When a former elite sniper is hunted down by the ruthless warlord who once held her captive, she must fight to the death to protect the daughter she has raised in hiding, on a remote Australian farm.

2022.title: Swapped
2022.overview: A small woodland creature and a majestic bird, two natural sworn enemies of the Valley, magically trade places and set off on an adventure of a lifetime to switch back. Their journey soon uncovers a greater threat—one that could endanger not only their species, but the entire valley they call home.

2022.title: Mortal Kombat II
2022.overview: The fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

2022.title: Remarkably Bright Creatures
2022.overview: Through unlikely bonds formed during night shifts at a local aquarium, Tova, an elderly widow, learns of a life-changing discovery that may bring her joy and wonder once again.

2022.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
2022.overview: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight.

2022.title: Obsession
2022.overview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

2022.title: In the Grey
2022.overview: A covert team of elite operatives are living in the shadows. When a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune, they're sent to take it back—an impossible heist that erupts into a deadly game of strategy, deception and survival.

2022.title: Power Ballad
2022.overview: When Rick, a past-his-prime wedding singer, meets fading boy-band star Danny during a gig, the two bond over music and a late-night jam session. But when Danny turns one of Rick’s songs into the hit that reignites his career, Rick sets out to reclaim the recognition he believes he deserves - even if it means risking everything he cares about.

2022.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu
2022.overview: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they have enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.

2022.title: Passenger
2022.overview: After a young couple witnesses a gruesome highway accident, they soon realize they did not leave the crash scene alone, as a demonic presence called the Passenger that won't stop until it claims them both turns their van life adventure into a nightmare.

2022.title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War
2022.overview: Jack Ryan is reluctantly pulled back into espionage when an international covert mission unravels a deadly conspiracy. Racing against time, he joins CIA allies Mike November & James Greer and sharp MI6 officer Emma Marlowe to battle a rogue black-ops unit in a high-stakes, deeply personal fight.

2022.title: Saccharine
2022.overview: After succumbing to an obscure weight-loss craze involving the eating of human ashes, lovelorn medical student Hana finds herself haunted by the ghost of the person she's eating.

2022.title: Pressure
