Grab your sparkliest outfit and dancing shoes for an unforgettable celebration of music, joy, and the magic of the moment!

2024.title: Knife's Edge
2024.overview: Is it possible to go from war to peace? A group of ex-guerrillas make a living as tour guides in the jungle where they once fought.

2024.title: John Pork
2024.overview: John Pork is bullied one night and he goes out to get revenge.

2024.title: Restless
2024.overview: A man finds himself trapped in his own thoughts, needing to break free.

2024.title: Veering
2024.overview: When a group of friends stumbles upon a mysterious man covered in blood during a midnight stop, fear drives them to speed away. But as guilt and tension escalate, their frantic journey takes a dangerous turn, leading them to face the unsettling truths about themselves and the limits of their morality.

2024.title: Fight or Flight
2024.overview: A mother, killed by her husband, dances her final dance of death as she struggles to return to life. The need to protect her child is the only thing that can pull her through.

2024.title: SuperNova
2024.overview: When aliens attack, part-time student and part-time superhero SuperNova has to save the day.

2024.title: In the Eyes of the Worm
2024.overview: A man on a walk considers his fellow creatures (a bird and a worm)

2024.title: Working Myself Into a Puddle
2024.overview: A sweet little man who appears to be made of tears sings a song

2024.title: Workers' Comp
2024.overview: After a workplace accident, Billy finds himself caught between his underpaid coworkers, eager to exploit the tragedy for a payout, and the company, desperate to settle the matter quietly.

2024.title: Whilst Waiting
2024.overview: A person spends some time in a room

2024.title: Maybe, Yes
2024.overview: Wian plans a secret New Year's Eve engagement to Anja at the place where they first met, but things don't run as smoothly as he would have hoped.

2024.title: Surviving Turning Point USA
2024.overview: Meet educators around the U.S. whose 'wrong think' wrought harassment, death threats, and violence after the 'charity' put them on a watchlist

2024.title: Gloria
2024.overview: Gloria’s attempt to kidnap the heir of a wealthy family succeeds in getting him through her apartment door. But once there, mistakes will soon plague her less-than-perfect plan.

2024.title: Tales from Zone 7 - An Oral History of the Making of Cherry 2000
2024.overview: A documentary on the making of Steve De Jarnatt's 1987 film, Cherry 2000.

2024.title: Nightmare in Argus
2024.overview: There is a serial killer called The Wet Slasher murdering women in Los Angeles. At the same time stand-up comic Millie Barker was kicked off a reality show just as she was close to winning a house and now she has been banished to a small, scary desert town called Argus for the past five years. Millie decides to get back at the show's producer, Regina Worthington, by kidnapping her wife, aspiring actress Andrea Worthington. Sally, Regina and Andrea all find their paths crossing with each other and the serial killer in this horror comedy with several twists and turns. Murder, mayhem and jokes set in a town where anything can happen.

2024.title: Under the One-Time Sky
2024.overview: Under swaying trees, two childhood friends careen into a past that has long been preserved in a tiny backyard. One has traveled the world. One has never left this town. Together, they will learn something today: How long can a moment stay with you? It may be just as long as you hide from it.

2024.title: These Sacred Hills
2024.overview: Facing an existential threat from a proposed green energy project, the Rock Creek Band of the Yakama Nation fights to protect their sacred sites and cultural resources. In a last-ditch effort to be heard, they open their community and reveal parts of their sacred culture for the first time.

2024.title: Leaward
2024.overview: Filmed in a single day in spring 2024, Leaward is a short form documentary profile piece about the people and places surrounding the River Lea, In north East London. Through a series of audio interviews we discuss the significance of the area with community activists, volunteers, local business owners and local residents. Portraits and atmospheric B roll footage illustrate the dialogue finding beauty in the everyday and ordinary.

2024.title: Legends From Possum Holler
2024.overview: Dolly Parton loving girl puts on performance for her grandpa in hopes of being allowed to see boyfriend in Possum Holler.

2024.title: Water Museum
2024.overview: A young man fails to attend his expat father's funeral in Hong Kong.

2024.title: Canfield Presents
2024.overview: Through the eyes of 'some weird guy with a camera', Canfield Presents highlights the best of the best, from the pregame to the game.

2024.title: Cuba, an Historical Romance
2024.overview: Stills from a trip in Cuba.

2024.title: 2 MULTI 2 MEDIA
2024.overview: While Dr. Bolyard fights his addiction to monster, long time client Jones discovers something new he might like.

2024.title: Our Country
2024.overview: Scott is eager to make a good impression on John, his new girlfriend's Dad, but whilst spending the evening at a pub with him and his friends, Scott is forced to confront some ugly home 'truths'.

2024.title: Horror Film in C Major
2024.overview: A pianist is home alone watching TV when a mysterious man calls, warning him of danger.

2024.title: The Essex Island That Won the Lottery
2024.overview: The uplifting story of a seaside town transformed by a £17.3M lottery win. Meet the working-class community of Canvey Island, who won a fantastic opportunity to improve their lives.

2024.title: Notre Dames
2024.overview: In 17th c. France, a bisexual swashbuckling swordswoman must rescue her ex from a convent after they're caught in an illicit affair.

2024.title: The Zen of Julie Weiss
2024.overview: A Documentary on Emmy Award winning and Oscar nominated costume designer, Julie Weiss.

2024.title: in houses just like these
2024.overview: short film featuring music by failwife.

2024.title: Late Night Conversations
2024.overview: The hands of fate, or just a chance at fresh air and quiet, bring two very different people together as they learn and grow through each other.

2024.title: From My Room
2024.overview: An unseen character observes the cold, harsh world around them while listening to The Beach Boys, hidden away in the safety of their bedroom.

2024.title: Jane McDonald's New Year Singalong
2024.overview: Let the New Year in Jane McDonald-style as she belts out a party playlist!

2024.title: Married to a Hood Legend
2024.overview: After a woman finds out her husband has been cheating on her with his ex-girlfriend from high school. She is left wondering if she will ever find true love.

2024.title: June
2024.overview: A letter of love to my past self who discovered himself.

2024.title: Unknown Callers
2024.overview: A collection of voicemails and memos, considering the humor, absurdity, and melancholy in one-sided conversations, lost messages, and missed connections.

2024.title: Freight
2024.overview: An original horror short film showcasing a character being haunted by an unknown source they later realize is gender dysphoria.  Rylie has long been ignoring a looming Figure that plagues her, until she finds kinship in Sam, who seems to be going through the same struggles.

2024.title: I've been thinking about how much time we have
2024.overview: A long-distance couple goes on a date.

2024.title: Seven Dawns
2024.overview: Seven Dawns explores the restlessness inherited from the artist’s estranged Romani ancestry in South West England. The seven dawns symbolise fleeting opportunities for escape, framed within the duality of home as both sanctuary and confinement. Captured on a Super 8mm cartridge, using a hand made lens and developed by hand, the film’s fragmented, spectral imagery evokes the fractured nature of history, memory, longing and place.

2024.title: Poker Night
2024.overview: Anthony "The Pretty Boy" Taylor invites his friends Rob, Mark and Jamie over for a night of drinking and poker. But when Mark is found dead, assumptions and accusations uncover lies and past trauma.

2024.title: Captain America: Brave New World
2024.overview: After meeting with newly elected U.S. President Thaddeus Ross, Sam finds himself in the middle of an international incident. He must discover the reason behind a nefarious global plot before the true mastermind has the entire world seeing red.

2024.title: The Gorge
2024.overview: Two highly trained operatives grow close from a distance after being sent to guard opposite sides of a mysterious gorge. When an evil below emerges, they must work together to survive what lies within.

2024.title: A Minecraft Movie
2024.overview: Four misfits find themselves struggling with ordinary problems when they are suddenly pulled through a mysterious portal into the Overworld: a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master this world while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected, expert crafter, Steve.

2024.title: Sinners
2024.overview: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

2024.title: Thunderbolts*
2024.overview: After finding themselves ensnared in a death trap, seven disillusioned castoffs must embark on a dangerous mission that will force them to confront the darkest corners of their pasts.

2024.title: Forgive Us All
2024.overview: In a post-apocalyptic world, a virus has transformed humans into violently deranged cannibals. A bereaved mother has lost everything and takes refuge in an isolated mountain cabin, until a desperate wounded stranger arrives with a story of hope.

2024.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
2024.overview: Ethan Hunt and team continue their search for the terrifying AI known as the Entity — which has infiltrated intelligence networks all over the globe — with the world's governments and a mysterious ghost from Hunt's past on their trail. Joined by new allies and armed with the means to shut the Entity down for good, Hunt is in a race against time to prevent the world as we know it from changing forever.

2024.title: Lilo & Stitch
2024.overview: The wildly funny and touching story of a lonely Hawaiian girl and the fugitive alien who helps to mend her broken family.

2024.title: How to Train Your Dragon
2024.overview: On the rugged isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been bitter enemies for generations, Hiccup stands apart, defying centuries of tradition when he befriends Toothless, a feared Night Fury dragon. Their unlikely bond reveals the true nature of dragons, challenging the very foundations of Viking society.

2024.title: KPop Demon Hunters
2024.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

2024.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
2024.overview: Five years after the events of Jurassic World Dominion, covert operations expert Zora Bennett is contracted to lead a skilled team on a top-secret mission to secure genetic material from the world's three most massive dinosaurs. When Zora's operation intersects with a civilian family whose boating expedition was capsized, they all find themselves stranded on an island where they come face-to-face with a sinister, shocking discovery that's been hidden from the world for decades.

2024.title: F1
2024.overview: Racing legend Sonny Hayes is coaxed out of retirement to lead a struggling Formula 1 team—and mentor a young hotshot driver—while chasing one more chance at glory.

2024.title: Superman
2024.overview: Superman, a journalist in Metropolis, embarks on a journey to reconcile his Kryptonian heritage with his human upbringing as Clark Kent.

2024.title: The Banished
2024.overview: Grace has nowhere to turn when she finds herself lost in the wilderness with a dark presence threatening to consume her in this twisted folk horror.

2024.title: The Fantastic 4: First Steps
2024.overview: Against the vibrant backdrop of a 1960s-inspired, retro-futuristic world, Marvel's First Family is forced to balance their roles as heroes with the strength of their family bond, while defending Earth from a ravenous space god called Galactus and his enigmatic Herald, Silver Surfer.

2024.title: The Bad Guys 2
2024.overview: The now-reformed Bad Guys are trying (very, very hard) to be good, but instead find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes, globe-trotting heist, masterminded by a new team of criminals they never saw coming: The Bad Girls.

2024.title: War of the Worlds
2024.overview: Will Radford is a top analyst for Homeland Security who tracks potential threats through a mass surveillance program, until one day an attack by an unknown entity leads him to question whether the government is hiding something from him... and from the rest of the world.

2024.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
2024.overview: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront.

2024.title: One Battle After Another
2024.overview: Washed-up revolutionary Bob exists in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited, self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces after 16 years and she goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her, father and daughter both battling the consequences of his past.

2024.title: Predator: Badlands
2024.overview: Cast out from his clan, a young Predator finds an unlikely ally in a damaged android and embarks on a treacherous journey in search of the ultimate adversary.

2024.title: The Running Man
2024.overview: Desperate to save his sick daughter, working-class Ben Richards is convinced by The Running Man's charming but ruthless producer to enter the deadly competition game as a last resort. But Ben's defiance, instincts, and grit turn him into an unexpected fan favorite — and a threat to the entire system. As ratings skyrocket, so does the danger, and Ben must outwit not just the Hunters, but a nation addicted to watching him fall.

2024.title: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
2024.overview: The original Four Horsemen reunite with a new generation of illusionists to take on powerful diamond heiress Veronika Vanderberg, who leads a criminal empire built on money laundering and trafficking. The new and old magicians must overcome their differences to work together on their most ambitious heist yet.

2024.title: Zootopia 2
2024.overview: After cracking the biggest case in Zootopia's history, rookie cops Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde find themselves on the twisting trail of a great mystery when Gary De'Snake arrives and turns the animal metropolis upside down. To crack the case, Judy and Nick must go undercover to unexpected new parts of town, where their growing partnership is tested like never before.

2024.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
2024.overview: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora: the Ash People, a violent and power-hungry Na'vi tribe led by the ruthless Varang. Jake's family must fight for their survival and the future of Pandora in a conflict that pushes them to their emotional and physical limits.

2024.title: The Housemaid
2024.overview: Trying to escape her past, Millie Calloway accepts a job as a live-in housemaid for the wealthy Nina and Andrew Winchester. But what begins as a dream job quickly unravels into something far more dangerous—a sexy, seductive game of secrets, scandal, and power.

2024.title: Greenland 2: Migration
2024.overview: Having found the safety of the Greenland bunker after the comet Clarke decimated the Earth, the Garrity family must now risk everything to embark on a perilous journey across the wasteland of Europe to find a new home.

2024.title: The Rip
2024.overview: Trust frays when a team of Miami cops discovers millions in cash inside a run-down stash house, calling everyone — and everything — into question.

2024.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
2024.overview: Dr. Kelson finds himself in a shocking new relationship - with consequences that could change the world as they know it - and Spike's encounter with Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

2024.title: Send Help
2024.overview: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.

2024.title: Shelter
2024.overview: A man living in self-imposed exile on a remote island rescues a young girl from a violent storm, setting off a chain of events that forces him out of seclusion to protect her from enemies tied to his past.

2024.title: The Wrecking Crew
2024.overview: Estranged half-brothers Jonny and James reunite after their father's mysterious death. As they search for the truth, buried secrets reveal a conspiracy threatening to tear their family apart.

2024.title: GOAT
2024.overview: A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.

2024.title: Crime 101
2024.overview: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

2024.title: War Machine
2024.overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

2024.title: Scream 7
2024.overview: When a new Ghostface killer emerges in the quiet town where Sidney Prescott has built a new life, her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target. Determined to protect her family, Sidney must face the horrors of her past to put an end to the bloodshed once and for all.

2024.title: Hoppers
2024.overview: Scientists have discovered how to 'hop' human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals. Animal lover Mabel seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world beyond anything she could have imagined.

2024.title: Dolly
2024.overview: Young Macy is abducted by a deranged, monstrous figure who wants to raise her as its child.

2024.title: Sniper: No Nation
2024.overview: Brandon Beckett and Agent Zero lead a rescue mission in Costa Verde when their friends are taken hostage.

2024.title: Over Your Dead Body
2024.overview: A dysfunctional couple head to a remote cabin to "reconnect", but each has secret intentions to kill the other.

2024.title: Project Hail Mary
2024.overview: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction.

2024.title: Ready or Not: Here I Come
2024.overview: Moments after surviving an all-out attack from the Le Domas family, Grace discovers she’s reached the next level of the nightmarish game — and this time with her estranged sister Faith at her side. Grace has one chance to survive, keep her sister alive, and claim the High Seat of the Council that controls the world. Four rival families are hunting her for the throne, and whoever wins rules it all.

2024.title: They Will Kill You
2024.overview: A woman answers a help wanted ad to be a housekeeper in a mysterious New York City high-rise, unaware that she is entering a community that has seen a number of disappearances over the years and may be under the grip of a Satanic cult.

2024.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
2024.overview: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.

2024.title: The Drama
2024.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

2024.title: Beast
2024.overview: MMA legend Patton James, now a commercial fisherman, is pulled back into the cage when his brother is in danger. Reuniting with his old coach Sammy, he commits to one final fight in one championship against the brutal champion Xavier Grau.

2024.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
2024.overview: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

2024.title: Normal
2024.overview: An unassuming substitute sheriff with a troubled past responds to a bank robbery in a small, sleepy town and unknowingly uncovers something far more explosive.

2024.title: Michael
2024.overview: The story of Michael Jackson, one of the most influential artists the world has ever known, and his life beyond the music. His journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world, highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career.

2024.title: Apex
2024.overview: A grieving woman pushing her limits on a solo adventure in the Australian wild is ensnared in a twisted game with a cunning killer who thinks she's prey.

2024.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
2024.overview: Andy Sachs returns to Runway as Miranda Priestly navigates a new media landscape and Runway's position within. The duo reconnect with former assistant Emily Charlton, now the head of a luxury brand that possesses funding which could ensure Runway's survival.

2024.title: Hokum
2024.overview: When novelist Ohm Bauman retreats to a remote inn to scatter his parents' ashes, he is consumed by tales of a witch haunting the honeymoon suite. Disturbing visions and a shocking disappearance forces him to confront dark corners of his past.

2024.title: Deep Water
2024.overview: A group of international passengers on a flight from Los Angeles to Shanghai is forced to make an emergency landing in shark-infested waters. The terrified group is forced to work together and overcome their differences if they hope to escape their sinking plane and the frenzy of sharks drawn to the wreckage.

2024.title: The Sheep Detectives
2024.overview: George Hardy is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can't possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep realize they must become the detectives. As they follow the clues and investigate human suspects, they prove that even sheep can be brilliant crime-solvers.

2024.title: Seven Snipers
2024.overview: When a former elite sniper is hunted down by the ruthless warlord who once held her captive, she must fight to the death to protect the daughter she has raised in hiding, on a remote Australian farm.

2024.title: Swapped
2024.overview: A small woodland creature and a majestic bird, two natural sworn enemies of the Valley, magically trade places and set off on an adventure of a lifetime to switch back. Their journey soon uncovers a greater threat—one that could endanger not only their species, but the entire valley they call home.

2024.title: Mortal Kombat II
2024.overview: The fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

2024.title: Remarkably Bright Creatures
2024.overview: Through unlikely bonds formed during night shifts at a local aquarium, Tova, an elderly widow, learns of a life-changing discovery that may bring her joy and wonder once again.

2024.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
2024.overview: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight.

2024.title: Obsession
2024.overview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

2024.title: In the Grey
2024.overview: A covert team of elite operatives are living in the shadows. When a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune, they're sent to take it back—an impossible heist that erupts into a deadly game of strategy, deception and survival.

2024.title: Power Ballad
2024.overview: When Rick, a past-his-prime wedding singer, meets fading boy-band star Danny during a gig, the two bond over music and a late-night jam session. But when Danny turns one of Rick’s songs into the hit that reignites his career, Rick sets out to reclaim the recognition he believes he deserves - even if it means risking everything he cares about.

2024.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu
2024.overview: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they have enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.

2024.title: Passenger
2024.overview: After a young couple witnesses a gruesome highway accident, they soon realize they did not leave the crash scene alone, as a demonic presence called the Passenger that won't stop until it claims them both turns their van life adventure into a nightmare.

2024.title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War
2024.overview: Jack Ryan is reluctantly pulled back into espionage when an international covert mission unravels a deadly conspiracy. Racing against time, he joins CIA allies Mike November & James Greer and sharp MI6 officer Emma Marlowe to battle a rogue black-ops unit in a high-stakes, deeply personal fight.

2024.title: Saccharine
2024.overview: After succumbing to an obscure weight-loss craze involving the eating of human ashes, lovelorn medical student Hana finds herself haunted by the ghost of the person she's eating.

2024.title: Pressure
2024.overview: In the tense 72 hours before D-Day, and the fate of the free world hanging in the balance, General Dwight D. Eisenhower and Captain James Stagg face an impossible choice—launch the largest and most dangerous seaborne invasion in history or risk losing the war altogether.

2024.title: Backrooms
2024.overview: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

2024.title: Chum
2024.overview: A newlywed couple joins friends on a Mediterranean yacht excursion, only to find themselves caught between a predatory shark and a psychopathic killer in their midst-transforming a sun-drenched escape into a fight for survival.

2024.title: The Breadwinner
2024.overview: After his wife Katie lands a once-in-a-lifetime deal on Shark Tank that takes her on a prolonged business trip - lifelong breadwinner Nate Wilcox now has to fend for his family as a first-time stay-at-home dad.

2024.title: Scary Movie
2024.overview: Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer, the Core Four are back in the killer's crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe.

2024.title: Masters of the Universe
2024.overview: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela and Duncan/Man-At-Arms, and embrace his true destiny as He-Man — the most powerful man in the universe.

2024.title: Disclosure Day
2024.overview: A cybersecurity expert becomes a whistleblower after uncovering secrets about aliens, putting him on the run from a corporation. Meanwhile, a meteorologist experiencing strange phenomena joins forces with him to prove there's life beyond our understanding.

2024.title: Stop! That! Train!
2024.overview: Best friends and train stewardesses Tess and DeeDee trade their dreary shifts on the Stank Rail for the glitzy Glamazonian Express. However, when a catastrophic Stormaganza threatens to crash the high-speed train into Celebration, Florida, the duo in coach must join forces with the snobby first-class attendants, a hot but dimwitted co-conductor, and fabulous US President Judy Gagwell to save the day.

2024.title: Toy Story 5
2024.overview: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new threat to playtime.

2024.title: Your Fault: London
2024.overview: Nick and Noah are both embarking on life-changing adventures that are threatening to pull them apart—Nick in business with his father and Noah starting a fresh chapter at Oxford University. Now living separate lives, and meeting new people, they find themselves entangled in temptations, rivalries, and betrayals and their bond is tested like never before. As secrets unravel and temptation rises, they must fight to hold onto each other—or risk losing everything.

2024.title: The Get Out
2024.overview: A nightclub owner is on the verge of leaving his dangerous past behind for retirement with his girlfriend. When masked gunmen rob him and he finds himself squeezed by ruthless cartels, a mysterious newcomer arrives with an interest in buying the business. With danger closing in from all sides, he must navigate a deadly web of deception, power, and survival  -  where escape may no longer be an option.

2024.title: Little Brother
2024.overview: A tightly wound realtor's picture-perfect life gets an extreme makeover when his lovably chaotic "little brother" suddenly reappears.

2024.title: The Death of Robin Hood
2024.overview: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chance at salvation.

2024.title: Girls Like Girls
2024.overview: Coley, 17, from rural Oregon, navigates intimacy after her mother's passing. Meeting Sonya sparks new feelings, but self-doubt hinders their connection. Sonya, unfamiliar with dating girls, is uncertain. They learn to embrace emotions.

2024.title: Citizen Vigilante
2024.overview: A man takes justice into his own hands, hunting down criminals. His vigilante crusade makes him a social media star but puts him at odds with the local police chief.

2024.title: Voicemails for Isabelle
2024.overview: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.

2024.title: Supergirl
2024.overview: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

2024.title: Minions & Monsters
2024.overview: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

2024.title: Black Box
2024.overview: A routine domestic flight turns into the flight from hell through a series of inexplicable phenomena and raw terror. Surreal encounters blur the boundaries between reality and nightmare. Passengers fight against all the odds in an attempt to survive while combating bizarre technological malfunctions, accelerating supernatural events and alien influences.

2024.title: The Invite
2024.overview: Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

2024.title: Enola Holmes 3
2024.overview: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

2024.title: Night of the Living Dead
2024.overview: A ragtag group barricade themselves in an old Pennsylvania farmhouse to remain safe from a horde of flesh-eating ghouls ravaging the Northeast.

2024.title: Simpsley
2024.overview: When penniless con-artist Marge Bouvier is sent to Italy to convince wealthy sap Seymour Skinner to come home, she’s tempted by the trappings of his affluent lifestyle. But there’s a big fat fly in the ointment: Skinner’s clingy, dim-witted mooch of a houseguest, Homer Simpsley. Lies, lust and Italian lira are abound.

2024.title: Evil Dead Burn
2024.overview: After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession. As her in-laws transform one by one into creatures that feed on fear, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life survive even in death.

2024.title: Moana
2024.overview: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.

2024.title: Heartstopper Forever
2024.overview: It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

2024.title: The Odyssey
2024.overview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters, and trials that stretch both his cunning and his humanity to the breaking point.

2024.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland
2024.overview: Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a new villain — Maddox Hatter. When Maddox captures the Queen of Hearts, Red and Chloe must work alongside Red’s new sister Pink, Luisa Madrigal’s son Luis, and Maddox’s son Max to save her and Wonderland.

2025.title: Captain America: Brave New World
2025.overview: After meeting with newly elected U.S. President Thaddeus Ross, Sam finds himself in the middle of an international incident. He must discover the reason behind a nefarious global plot before the true mastermind has the entire world seeing red.

2025.title: The Gorge
2025.overview: Two highly trained operatives grow close from a distance after being sent to guard opposite sides of a mysterious gorge. When an evil below emerges, they must work together to survive what lies within.

2025.title: A Minecraft Movie
2025.overview: Four misfits find themselves struggling with ordinary problems when they are suddenly pulled through a mysterious portal into the Overworld: a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master this world while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected, expert crafter, Steve.

2025.title: Sinners
2025.overview: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

2025.title: Thunderbolts*
2025.overview: After finding themselves ensnared in a death trap, seven disillusioned castoffs must embark on a dangerous mission that will force them to confront the darkest corners of their pasts.

2025.title: Forgive Us All
2025.overview: In a post-apocalyptic world, a virus has transformed humans into violently deranged cannibals. A bereaved mother has lost everything and takes refuge in an isolated mountain cabin, until a desperate wounded stranger arrives with a story of hope.

2025.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
2025.overview: Plagued by a violent recurring nightmare, college student Stefanie heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

2025.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
2025.overview: Ethan Hunt and team continue their search for the terrifying AI known as the Entity — which has infiltrated intelligence networks all over the globe — with the world's governments and a mysterious ghost from Hunt's past on their trail. Joined by new allies and armed with the means to shut the Entity down for good, Hunt is in a race against time to prevent the world as we know it from changing forever.

2025.title: Lilo & Stitch
2025.overview: The wildly funny and touching story of a lonely Hawaiian girl and the fugitive alien who helps to mend her broken family.

2025.title: How to Train Your Dragon
2025.overview: On the rugged isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been bitter enemies for generations, Hiccup stands apart, defying centuries of tradition when he befriends Toothless, a feared Night Fury dragon. Their unlikely bond reveals the true nature of dragons, challenging the very foundations of Viking society.

2025.title: KPop Demon Hunters
2025.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

2025.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
2025.overview: Five years after the events of Jurassic World Dominion, covert operations expert Zora Bennett is contracted to lead a skilled team on a top-secret mission to secure genetic material from the world's three most massive dinosaurs. When Zora's operation intersects with a civilian family whose boating expedition was capsized, they all find themselves stranded on an island where they come face-to-face with a sinister, shocking discovery that's been hidden from the world for decades.

2025.title: F1
2025.overview: Racing legend Sonny Hayes is coaxed out of retirement to lead a struggling Formula 1 team—and mentor a young hotshot driver—while chasing one more chance at glory.

2025.title: Superman
2025.overview: Superman, a journalist in Metropolis, embarks on a journey to reconcile his Kryptonian heritage with his human upbringing as Clark Kent.

2025.title: The Banished
2025.overview: Grace has nowhere to turn when she finds herself lost in the wilderness with a dark presence threatening to consume her in this twisted folk horror.

2025.title: The Fantastic 4: First Steps
2025.overview: Against the vibrant backdrop of a 1960s-inspired, retro-futuristic world, Marvel's First Family is forced to balance their roles as heroes with the strength of their family bond, while defending Earth from a ravenous space god called Galactus and his enigmatic Herald, Silver Surfer.

2025.title: The Bad Guys 2
2025.overview: The now-reformed Bad Guys are trying (very, very hard) to be good, but instead find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes, globe-trotting heist, masterminded by a new team of criminals they never saw coming: The Bad Girls.

2025.title: War of the Worlds
2025.overview: Will Radford is a top analyst for Homeland Security who tracks potential threats through a mass surveillance program, until one day an attack by an unknown entity leads him to question whether the government is hiding something from him... and from the rest of the world.

2025.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
2025.overview: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront.

2025.title: One Battle After Another
2025.overview: Washed-up revolutionary Bob exists in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited, self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces after 16 years and she goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her, father and daughter both battling the consequences of his past.

2025.title: Frankenstein
2025.overview: Dr. Victor Frankenstein, a brilliant but egotistical scientist, brings a creature to life in a monstrous experiment that ultimately leads to the undoing of both the creator and his tragic creation.

2025.title: Predator: Badlands
2025.overview: Cast out from his clan, a young Predator finds an unlikely ally in a damaged android and embarks on a treacherous journey in search of the ultimate adversary.

2025.title: The Running Man
2025.overview: Desperate to save his sick daughter, working-class Ben Richards is convinced by The Running Man's charming but ruthless producer to enter the deadly competition game as a last resort. But Ben's defiance, instincts, and grit turn him into an unexpected fan favorite — and a threat to the entire system. As ratings skyrocket, so does the danger, and Ben must outwit not just the Hunters, but a nation addicted to watching him fall.

2025.title: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
2025.overview: The original Four Horsemen reunite with a new generation of illusionists to take on powerful diamond heiress Veronika Vanderberg, who leads a criminal empire built on money laundering and trafficking. The new and old magicians must overcome their differences to work together on their most ambitious heist yet.

2025.title: Zootopia 2
2025.overview: After cracking the biggest case in Zootopia's history, rookie cops Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde find themselves on the twisting trail of a great mystery when Gary De'Snake arrives and turns the animal metropolis upside down. To crack the case, Judy and Nick must go undercover to unexpected new parts of town, where their growing partnership is tested like never before.

2025.title: Hunting Season
2025.overview: When a reclusive survivalist and his daughter rescue a mysterious, wounded woman from a river, they become entangled in a deadly web of violence and revenge, forcing them to confront a brutal criminal to survive.

2025.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
2025.overview: Desperate to be a big guy, SpongeBob sets out to prove his bravery to Mr. Krabs by following The Flying Dutchman – a mysterious swashbuckling ghost pirate – on a seafaring adventure that takes him to the deepest depths of the deep sea, where no Sponge has gone before.

2025.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
2025.overview: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora: the Ash People, a violent and power-hungry Na'vi tribe led by the ruthless Varang. Jake's family must fight for their survival and the future of Pandora in a conflict that pushes them to their emotional and physical limits.

2025.title: The Housemaid
2025.overview: Trying to escape her past, Millie Calloway accepts a job as a live-in housemaid for the wealthy Nina and Andrew Winchester. But what begins as a dream job quickly unravels into something far more dangerous—a sexy, seductive game of secrets, scandal, and power.

2025.title: Questions And...
2025.overview: As the Ricci family confront the imminent loss of one of their own, 10-year-old Jonah aims to uncover the truth about what happened to his sister.

2025.title: The Cheerleader...
2025.overview: After a young cheerleader, Niamh, works her back from an injury, she finds out she has been replaced by her team.

2025.title: Mendocino
2025.overview: A lawyer faces ancestral violence and haunting memories in a California farmhouse, exploring guilt and redemption.

2025.title: Francis
2025.overview: Based loosely on the life of Saint Francis of Assisi, Francis follows a young woman's grief-driven spiral into opioid abuse and piety.

2025.title: The Trouble with Declan
2025.overview: After his work gets rejected, a struggling writer finds inspiration in a Bible study group under the guidance of the cryptic Pastor Johnson. What begins as a creative revival slowly twists into something far more mysterious and dangerous.

2025.title: Blow-Off
2025.overview: In February of 2022, awkward high schooler George is invited to his crush's party, ostensibly as a photographer. While there, however, his night takes a turn in a different direction.

2025.title: Empty Lands
2025.overview: When a soldier and his wife move into a state-subsidized house, the mystery of a missing daughter from the family who once lived there disturbs their domestic life.

2025.title: Distant Camera
2025.overview: Andy Towers lives in his car, taking photos of an unseen woman. Pete Mauder, his friend, brings coffee to console him.

2025.title: Being Stanley Baxter
2025.overview: A portrait of Stanley Baxter, Scotland’s most dazzling TV star of the 1970s and ’80s, whose groundbreaking sketches and lavish specials made him a household name. Behind the fame, Baxter lived a hidden double life as a gay man in a hostile era, balancing public brilliance with private secrecy. Made shortly before his death, the film draws on personal archives and recordings to reveal the man behind the legend.

2025.title: Misdirection
2025.overview: Ivan, a struggling magician, gets the break of a lifetime and tries to get the life he's always wanted.

2025.title: Jack Falls in Love
2025.overview: Jack has 4 dates set up, all on ONE day, hilarity ensues

2025.title: The Boulder
2025.overview: An aspiring artist repeatedly paints Sisyphus pushing the boulder, as she attempts to break into the art world, experiencing simultaneous success, failure, support and disappointment.

2025.title: Ronan Keating & Friends: A New Year’s Eve Party
2025.overview: Get ready for the ultimate New Year’s Eve party as global music legend Ronan Keating takes centre stage to lead the celebrations into 2026. A night packed with incredible performances, big surprises, and feel-good hits as Ronan performs some of his greatest songs alongside a lineup of very special guests.

2025.title: Making Love Songs
2025.overview: A teenager photographs his classmate's suicides.

2025.title: Post Obitum
2025.overview: A bioengineered soldier is sent to execute an aging war criminal, only to discover that they both have a past together that forces him to question his identity, his mission, and the humanity he was never meant to possess.

2025.title: Nowhere Man
2025.overview: A young, unemployed man, overwhelmed by city life and his own internal struggles, takes to the streets of London to escape.

2025.title: My Yellow, Your Red
2025.overview: Lila, a woman in her late twenties, visits home for the Persian New Year. She faces intense cultural pressures from her elders to conform to traditional beauty standards. As the festivities approach, Lila must decide whether to comply with her elders' expectations or forge her own path.

2025.title: Rule, Britannia
2025.overview: A pair of flag waving Brits go to sea to stop the Refugee Small Boats. But their naval fantasy falls apart and they are forced to beg for rescue from the very people they set out to stop.

2025.title: Apple Music Live: Fred again..
2025.overview: Party into the new year with the DJ, who played an electrifying set in Dublin during his USB002 show, accompanied by his friends and guests.

2025.title: Wetiko
2025.overview: In the Maya jungle, a young Maya man’s journey with sacred toads collides with a fight for spirit and land—against outsiders led by a predatory white cult leader.

2025.title: Glint
2025.overview: As the fear of her impending adulthood becomes louder, a sedentary girl is asked to go to a party.

2025.title: A Couple Lives Together
2025.overview: A man and woman spend time with each other in their apartment. Presented as ten vignettes.

2025.title: Baby Brother
2025.overview: It's the mid-eighties and six-year-old Timmy is going to be a big brother. There is nothing he wants more in life than the premiere home video game system. When his mother loses the pregnancy, Timmy offers to give up his video game savings to buy a new baby brother.

2025.title: Attack on Arkinboro Lane
2025.overview: Fred tries to bring his two best friends on a camping trip after a recent break-up changes the friends group. However, things suddenly take an unexpected turn when their chaotic trip turns into a nightmare.

2025.title: HOPELESS
2025.overview: In attempt to reconcile with his past, a man writes a letter to someone named Hope.

2025.title: Lake-Emba
2025.overview: It's 1982 and Becky's second first day of year 6 where she discovers the value in embracing her age and those around her; in her magical town of Lake-Emba.

2025.title: Screw Year's Eve
2025.overview: A group of friends decide to ring in the New Year at an extravagant 80s-themed party hosted in a remote warehouse at the edge of town. As the night unfolds, they quickly realize they are not alone. Trapped in a labyrinth of neon lights and retro nostalgia, they find themselves hunted by a merciless killer hell-bent on making sure they never see another year.

2025.title: Here We Go: Our New Year’s Fireworks Fantasaganza
2025.overview: Rachel's ambitious plans to hold a New Year party like those of old - together with Paul's determination to finally please his family after years of unimpressive fireworks displays - get corrupted; on Robin's suggestion, the family AirBNBs their own home in order to fund a New Year's Eve getaway to somewhere startlingly alike in suburban quality, with Paul's persistent boil necessitating the prerequisite of a sauna to quell it for good - which renders itself available in an unconventional method. Sue finds herself new friends in a slimmers' club whose activities seem directly antithetical to the group's aims, while Sam discovers the complexity of relationships after a mix-up results in an offensive gift to his new girlfriend.

2025.title: Have a Safe Trip
2025.overview: Carl and Michelle are going to traverse the galaxy together…without leaving the comfort of Carl’s living room.

2025.title: Astro Boy
2025.overview: In a dystopian world, a lone-wolf spaceman treks for treasure until he finds a little Boy in his way.

2025.title: Yesterday I Lived Forever
2025.overview: Trapped in a world of eternal light, Dracula wanders aimlessly and passive. However, after meeting The Golden Woman bathed in sunlight, and The Black Crow, he regains his hunger for blood.

2025.title: Remanence
2025.overview: After creating a powerful liquid that grants superhuman abilities, a scientist races to keep it from criminals and prevent global disaster.

2025.title: Headlines
2025.overview: A fading actress and her A-List husband confront the realities of their relationship after a recent tragedy.

2025.title: Too Soon
2025.overview: A Second Shot at love comes sooner than expected for a young widow and widower who meet the day of their spouses' funerals.

2025.title: 4 Hour Heist
2025.overview: A group of trigger-happy thugs from the streets of Detroit team up to find $1 million buried in the woods, but they only have 4 hours before a killer drug kingpin is released from prison and comes for the money. Once the thugs begin looking for the money, uninvited guests appear; then all hell breaks loose.

2025.title: Paradise
2025.overview: A young man visits a Buddhist temple in the hopes of quenching his thirst.

2025.title: Legend of Yukon
2025.overview: In the wild summer lands of the Yukon, a newborn horse takes his first steps into the world. When tragedy strikes, a young foal is forced to run for his life carrying with him the legacy of his mother, the kindness of strangers, and a destiny shaped by survival, loyalty, and courage as the seasons change.

2025.title: My Hero
2025.overview: My Hero is an action thriller about coming out of your comfort zone. We follow the story of a loner, Nathan, who has been pushed around by life, and his only happiness is martial arts films. He built so many walls around his life that he can’t get out of a routine of a low-level cleaner job at a gym and lonely night-time binges on TV. Until he can’t have enough of his horrible life, he joins a human trial to become a better self. Not knowing what he signed up for is more than a friendly trial to help people. To make matters worse, Nathan is now accidentally involved with a criminal organisation, and he has no answer or defences. Until his alter ego - HERO, spawns out. But Hero, just like Nathan, is full of flaws and contradictions. And the two form an unlikely friendship where perhaps at the end, only one can survive. An action film for the new generation full of adrenaline, fights, emotions and martial arts.

2025.title: Modify
2025.overview: A timeline of transformation, compiled from 8 years' worth of photos by and of transgender actress and filmmaker Robyn Adams.

2025.title: A Dance to the Death
2025.overview: Growing old isn't a choice. Growing up is.

2025.title: The Other Shore
2025.overview: In the late 2000s, Saigon, along a riverside working-class quarter caught between the past and the future, a worker resigned to his fate risks everything to push his young gifted best friend toward a better life. A Vietnamese remake of a scene in Good Will Hunting (1997).

2025.title: One Year In
2025.overview: A young immigrant couple's relationship is put to the test.

2025.title: Care That Comes from the Heart
2025.overview: After years of living abroad, Luisa comes home to surprising news: an engagement to the wealthy bachelor Diego, much to the dismay of her secret lover, the farm boy Anton. Can love keep them safe when everything else falls apart?  Philippine Airlines’ latest inflight safety video is a full-blown telenovela—packed with drama, heated confrontations, and heartbreaking tears—to keep you watching until the very end.

2025.title: The Peanut Vendors
2025.overview: Peanut Vendors - sometimes they sell, sometimes they help.

2025.title: Blondie Boy
2025.overview: Two impressive teenagers wait for their mothers to finish talking.

2025.title: GenX: the Saga of Forever Chemicals
2025.overview: GenX is a four-part documentary covering the complex issue of "forever chemicals" as a global challenge. This journey follows a team personally affected in their seven-year quest to understand the origin, depth and real solutions for this problem. This is a story of hope.  Directed by Elijah Yetter-Bowman, produced by Ethereal Films, Mark Ruffalo, Ray Ellis and made in collaboration with the Paperhand Puppet Intervention.

2025.title: At Your Age
2025.overview: A young man attends a chaotic party of family friends.

2025.title: Piranesi – Visionary of Shadow and Stone
2025.overview: The name Piranesi evokes a world of mystery and imagination. The Italian architect, engraver, and archaeologist gifted us with dreamlike visions – labyrinthine spaces where stairways lead to nowhere and shadows stretch into the unknown. At the same time, he celebrated the monumental beauty of ancient Rome in his iconic vedute – vivid panoramas of the “Eternal City” that spread far and wide across Europe.  But who was Giovanni Battista Piranesi, the man behind these extraordinary creations? Very little is known about his life and inner world. This documentary seeks to trace his footsteps, to delve into the enigma he left behind and to bring us closer to understanding the mind of a genius who built entire worlds on paper.

2025.title: PROMISES
2025.overview: While settling into a new house, a young man revisits an old memory tied to a promise, forcing him to confront the cost of attachment, sacrifice, and the quiet weight of expectations.

2025.title: The Strangers’ Case
2025.overview: In 1517, anti-immigrant riots broke out in London. Thomas More, then a deputy Sheriff of the city, intervened. Decades later, William Shakespeare wrote a speech for the play 'Sir Thomas More', in which More defended asylum seekers - 'the strangers'.

2025.title: Echoes of a Broken Heart
2025.overview: On New Year's Eve, heartbroken Beni accidentally opens a rift between worlds unleashing Dr. Frank-N-Furter into reality. With Majo, Pato, Mau, and a little help from Elphaba, he must face his pain before it destroys both universes forever.

2025.title: Arrogant 6-7 Mason Out For Blood
2025.overview: Donald Mulligan, after a break-up, decides to go be a hero and save all performative males from the most arrogant 6-7 mason out for blood in the world, known as Jake Jacob Smokes, all with the help of his best friend, Henry XII...

2025.title: Londynek
2025.overview: Details and life of Pomorska street in Bydgoszcz

2025.title: Airport 2025
2025.overview: A documentary about Los Angeles International Airport in the year 2025.

2025.title: Rataje Ride
2025.overview: Friends ride through Rataje district in Poznań, exceeding time in Google Street Views

2025.title: Wooden Hearts
2025.overview: An upcoming motion picture by Onur Tukel

2025.title: Creamy, Not Crunchy
2025.overview: When Craig makes a simple but puzzling grocery request, his roommates become perplexed and hesitant to learn his true motivations.

2025.title: Jane McDonald's New Year's Singalong
2025.overview: Jane McDonald looks ahead to the New Year, while belting out a party playlist of floor fillers, showstoppers and toe-tapping tunes. Plus, a sing-a-long with Jane at home and a few celebrity surprises

2025.title: A Bold Accusation
2025.overview: A game night quickly goes south

2025.title: Ratols & Ransom
2025.overview: A bustling and average police precinct is disrupted when a frantic teenager enters with a huge problem.

2025.title: 2025-12-14 (izzy film)
2025.overview: An experiment with images I recorded and didn't record. An attempt at making a film about a film I didn't make.

2025.title: Richard Herring: Can I Have My Ball Back?
2025.overview: In the lockdown of January 2021, Richard Herring went to his GP to find out why his right testicle seemed to be growing bigger. It turned out that he had testicular cancer and one month later he was lying in hospital waiting to have his murderous gonad removed. Would he survive? (No spoilers!)  For a comedian who had done a whole show about male genitalia (Talking Cock) and written a book about toxic masculinity (The Problem With Men), this seemed like a cruel twist of fate.  But because he’s a comedian, he was able to get a book and a stand-up tour out of it all. And now he’s got a DVD too! Recorded at the Gordon Craig Theatre in Stevenage (just 1.9 miles from where Richard’s knacker was excised) by the fabulous gofasterstripe.com crew.  Featuring a special appearance by Right Bollock and with extras including one of the first live performances of this material, the full audio podcast series and a commentary track from a mystery celebrity.

2025.title: Chartowo Tower
2025.overview: Exploration of the tilted tower of Poznań

2025.title: The Stray
2025.overview: In a quiet neighborhood where nothing ever happens, two girls have a secret.  Starring Kaylee Christmas and Khloe Christmas, The Stray is a haunting tale of friendship, control, and the blurry line between care and captivity.

2025.title: The Station
2025.overview: A man from the olive lands finally going to meet his wife and see his daughter for the first time after long time defending his country in the army , what a wonderful day!

2025.title: Avenue de l'Opéra
2025.overview: Remake of the 1900 Alice Guy-Blaché short showing a Paris street in reverse.

2025.title: Oasis Bandung Live Forever
2025.overview: Oasis Bandung Live Forever tells the story of the struggle of the Oasis Bandung Community to maintain its identity and unity since its inception, overcoming internal conflicts, a lack of activities, and the impact of the pandemic.  However, thanks to the solidarity of its members and small gigs that kept the spirit alive, they rose again with a new concept that expanded the community's influence. Despite another organizational crisis, sponsor support and the principle of “from the community, to the community” became the foundation that kept Oasis Bandung alive and beloved.

2025.title: Driving Home for Christmas
2025.overview: 𝐀 𝐂𝐡𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐦𝐚𝐬-𝐡𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐠 𝐦𝐚𝐧 𝐦𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐫 𝐛𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐚𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐨𝐧 𝐂𝐡𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐦𝐚𝐬 𝐃𝐚𝐲.

2025.title: Amanda
2025.overview: AMANDA is an upcoming crime-thriller short film about a meeting of those with vested interests with an unstoppable, silent presence on their rise to power.

2025.title: The Milk Carton Kids: Live From The Ryman
2025.overview: The Milk Carton Kids perform at the Ryman Auditorium in Nashville, Tennessee, on February 1, 2024.

2025.title: Wizardream
2025.overview: A fantasy/science-fiction/sword'n'sorcery film from director John Carl Buechler. Shot in 2013 and still unreleased, this is a follow up to Trolls.

2025.title: Soothing Family Landscapes
2025.overview: A family live stream is repeatedly interrupted by its own sponsor's inappropriate marketing.

2025.title: Radu Drăgușin: Life & Recovery
2025.overview: From Elfsborg to Crystal Palace - this is the 11-month journey that Radu Drăgușin endured to return to the football pitch for Tottenham Hotspur after his ACL injury

2025.title: Dragons In Seattle
2025.overview: In a decade long feat, the crew of "Lizard Boy" chart their journey from Seattle to Off-Broadway while discussing what it takes to make a musical worthy of the New York stage and beyond.

2025.title: Cost of Living
2025.overview: Disgraced journalist Jayne Baghurst seeks to re-establish herself in London through the support of her daughter Robin, after being served with divorce papers from her husband. While Jayne attempts to force her once-obliging spouse to take on the substantial debt she has accrued during their year of separation, Robin begins to see the social contracts underlying her family relationships for what they are.

2025.title: Experiment 626
2025.overview: sincerity in the dying moments of twenty-first century irony

2025.title: Paillettes
2025.overview: When they have a unique opportunity to gain superpowers, Lucas and Julie make choices that will challenge their relationship.

2025.title: Carly Rae Jepsen: The Most Beautiful Night of 2025
2025.overview: Carly Rae Jepsen performs live in China for Bilibili's 2025 New Year's Eve Gala.

2025.title: Between Pages: The Story of Marcello Pennacchio
2025.overview: Between the Pages focuses on lifelong educator and award-winning children's author Dr Marcello Pennacchio, exploring the creation and inspiration behind one of Australia's best-selling children's picture books, Somewhere in Australia.

2025.title: Anak Dara Ke Janda Baik
2025.overview: Because they were each disappointed after being laid off due to the economic crisis, Fifi, Nina and Sindhu go on vacation to Janda Baik village to clear their minds. However, they do not know that they are carrying a mysterious item sent by Fifi's former boss. Because of that item, they become targets of criminals.

2025.title: no worries, mate
2025.overview: Eliana's neighbour always keeps the top light on, the white glow spills right into her backyard, and she can see everything. So when her neighbour hangs a disturbing flag in the window in clear view of her children, she feels compelled to call the police.

2025.title: Solace
2025.overview: A grieving man aimlessly wanders the streets of Liverpool in search of solace.

2025.title: Kebab City
2025.overview: A glimpse into three different döner buffets in Berlin and how they are connected to the city with their own style.

2025.title: The Last Supper
2025.overview: The Last Supper is a story about an impulsive son who confronts his ruthless father, which leads to a final supper about betrayal, legacy, and blood.

2025.title: JUVENiLE
2025.overview: Juvenile highlights the harsh reality of bad parenting and its irreversible impact on a child’s future. Influenced at a young age, a minor slips into alcoholism, revealing how neglect and poor guidance can turn innocence into addiction.

2025.title: Josh Wakes Up In Purgatory
2025.overview: A man awakes in the last place he remembers seeing before his death. This is the waiting room.

2025.title: Quiet Wing
2025.overview: When college student Amara Graye begins receiving cryptic threats, what starts as targeted harassment spirals into a disturbing psychological mystery. As paranoia fractures her sense of reality, Amara’s fear begins to resemble control and her trauma may hide more than one kind of danger.

2025.title: Phantom of the Dojo
2025.overview: Drew's dad owns a dojo. She's a pretty good boxer... her boyfriend, Freddie, isn't so the two sneak a practice in after hours. Drew's a tough girl but tonight she broke down into a million pieces. She became the punching bag... to thin air? Distraught she runs away and drops her keys in the process. Freddie picks them up and hides them away... she has the car started and is begging Freddie to jump ship with her. Freddie doesn't disobey - he runs after but feels goosebumps at the door. There's something there and Freddie's gonna kick its ass someway, somehow.

2025.title: Crushed
2025.overview: Their creative journeys at a standstill, a photographer and an actress form an unexpected bond.

2025.title: untitled recording
2025.overview: After her sister's suicide, a girl records herself talking and trying to get through the days without her.

2025.title: Afterlight
2025.overview: Surya, a 20-year-old drug addict, felt anxious on the final day of his rehabilitation. The urge to use illegal drugs still loomed large within him, making him reflect on his former life as an addict and feel fearful and anxious about his uncertain future. Until hope arrived and took him boldly into a new life.

2025.title: The Midnight Special
2025.overview: When a cryptic note appears at his apartment promising a midnight revelation, a paranoid college student spirals into chaos trying to uncover the sender, only to discover that the truth might be worse than the mystery.

2025.title: Temple Rejects
2025.overview: When their apartment is unexpectedly put up for demolition, a group of students make a plan of attack to prevent from getting expelled.

2025.title: 30 Juzuk Terakhir
2025.overview: A story of sacrifice, a child's love, and a sacred text that bears witness to sincerity. Syaqirah, a university student and hafizah who rewrites the Quran verse by verse as a gift for her aging mother. However, fate comes before all else. The manuscript ultimately becomes a will, leaving behind an enlightenment that seeps into every heart.

2025.title: The Tell-Tale Heart
2025.overview: This short film adaptation of Edgar Allan Poe's famous short story follows the events of a killer reminiscing on the murderous deed he committed.

2025.title: Firewalk
2025.overview: A pre-apocalyptic midnight walk takes you through a burning forest to witness a looming destruction. A fire in the forest either marks an impending doom or serves as a metaphysical gateway between realities.

2025.title: The Candidate
2025.overview: "The Candidate" is a sports drama about a university chess player (Taishan) defending his spot in the team against a higher rated junior opponent (Schwaas). Taishan must rise above mind games, challenge the arrogant Schwaas and prepare for a final, dramatic showdown that will determine who gets to represent the chess team in university tournaments.

2025.title: Refractions in Green
2025.overview: A garden in autumn.

2025.title: Greenland 2: Migration
2025.overview: Having found the safety of the Greenland bunker after the comet Clarke decimated the Earth, the Garrity family must now risk everything to embark on a perilous journey across the wasteland of Europe to find a new home.

2025.title: The Rip
2025.overview: Trust frays when a team of Miami cops discovers millions in cash inside a run-down stash house, calling everyone — and everything — into question.

2025.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
2025.overview: Dr. Kelson finds himself in a shocking new relationship - with consequences that could change the world as they know it - and Spike's encounter with Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

2025.title: Mercy
2025.overview: In the near future, a detective stands on trial accused of murdering his wife. He has ninety minutes to prove his innocence to the advanced AI Judge he once championed, before it determines his fate.

2025.title: Send Help
2025.overview: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.

2025.title: Shelter
2025.overview: A man living in self-imposed exile on a remote island rescues a young girl from a violent storm, setting off a chain of events that forces him out of seclusion to protect her from enemies tied to his past.

2025.title: The Wrecking Crew
2025.overview: Estranged half-brothers Jonny and James reunite after their father's mysterious death. As they search for the truth, buried secrets reveal a conspiracy threatening to tear their family apart.

2025.title: GOAT
2025.overview: A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.

2025.title: Crime 101
2025.overview: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

2025.title: "Wuthering Heights"
2025.overview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

2025.title: War Machine
2025.overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

2025.title: Scream 7
2025.overview: When a new Ghostface killer emerges in the quiet town where Sidney Prescott has built a new life, her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target. Determined to protect her family, Sidney must face the horrors of her past to put an end to the bloodshed once and for all.

2025.title: Hoppers
2025.overview: Scientists have discovered how to 'hop' human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals. Animal lover Mabel seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world beyond anything she could have imagined.

2025.title: Dolly
2025.overview: Young Macy is abducted by a deranged, monstrous figure who wants to raise her as its child.

2025.title: Sniper: No Nation
2025.overview: Brandon Beckett and Agent Zero lead a rescue mission in Costa Verde when their friends are taken hostage.

2025.title: Over Your Dead Body
2025.overview: A dysfunctional couple head to a remote cabin to "reconnect", but each has secret intentions to kill the other.

2025.title: Project Hail Mary
2025.overview: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction.

2025.title: Ready or Not: Here I Come
2025.overview: Moments after surviving an all-out attack from the Le Domas family, Grace discovers she’s reached the next level of the nightmarish game — and this time with her estranged sister Faith at her side. Grace has one chance to survive, keep her sister alive, and claim the High Seat of the Council that controls the world. Four rival families are hunting her for the throne, and whoever wins rules it all.

2025.title: Do Not Enter
2025.overview: A group of young explorers investigates an old abandoned hotel, only to encounter a strange supernatural being and a competing group looking for a legendary hidden treasure.

2025.title: They Will Kill You
2025.overview: A woman answers a help wanted ad to be a housekeeper in a mysterious New York City high-rise, unaware that she is entering a community that has seen a number of disappearances over the years and may be under the grip of a Satanic cult.

2025.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
2025.overview: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.

2025.title: The Drama
2025.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

2025.title: Beast
2025.overview: MMA legend Patton James, now a commercial fisherman, is pulled back into the cage when his brother is in danger. Reuniting with his old coach Sammy, he commits to one final fight in one championship against the brutal champion Xavier Grau.

2025.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
2025.overview: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

2025.title: Normal
2025.overview: An unassuming substitute sheriff with a troubled past responds to a bank robbery in a small, sleepy town and unknowingly uncovers something far more explosive.

2025.title: Michael
2025.overview: The story of Michael Jackson, one of the most influential artists the world has ever known, and his life beyond the music. His journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world, highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career.

2025.title: Apex
2025.overview: A grieving woman pushing her limits on a solo adventure in the Australian wild is ensnared in a twisted game with a cunning killer who thinks she's prey.

2025.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
2025.overview: Andy Sachs returns to Runway as Miranda Priestly navigates a new media landscape and Runway's position within. The duo reconnect with former assistant Emily Charlton, now the head of a luxury brand that possesses funding which could ensure Runway's survival.

2025.title: Hokum
2025.overview: When novelist Ohm Bauman retreats to a remote inn to scatter his parents' ashes, he is consumed by tales of a witch haunting the honeymoon suite. Disturbing visions and a shocking disappearance forces him to confront dark corners of his past.

2025.title: Deep Water
2025.overview: A group of international passengers on a flight from Los Angeles to Shanghai is forced to make an emergency landing in shark-infested waters. The terrified group is forced to work together and overcome their differences if they hope to escape their sinking plane and the frenzy of sharks drawn to the wreckage.

2025.title: The Sheep Detectives
2025.overview: George Hardy is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can't possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep realize they must become the detectives. As they follow the clues and investigate human suspects, they prove that even sheep can be brilliant crime-solvers.

2025.title: Seven Snipers
2025.overview: When a former elite sniper is hunted down by the ruthless warlord who once held her captive, she must fight to the death to protect the daughter she has raised in hiding, on a remote Australian farm.

2025.title: Swapped
2025.overview: A small woodland creature and a majestic bird, two natural sworn enemies of the Valley, magically trade places and set off on an adventure of a lifetime to switch back. Their journey soon uncovers a greater threat—one that could endanger not only their species, but the entire valley they call home.

2025.title: Mortal Kombat II
2025.overview: The fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

2025.title: Remarkably Bright Creatures
2025.overview: Through unlikely bonds formed during night shifts at a local aquarium, Tova, an elderly widow, learns of a life-changing discovery that may bring her joy and wonder once again.

2025.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
2025.overview: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight.

2025.title: Obsession
2025.overview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

2025.title: In the Grey
2025.overview: A covert team of elite operatives are living in the shadows. When a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune, they're sent to take it back—an impossible heist that erupts into a deadly game of strategy, deception and survival.

2025.title: Power Ballad
2025.overview: When Rick, a past-his-prime wedding singer, meets fading boy-band star Danny during a gig, the two bond over music and a late-night jam session. But when Danny turns one of Rick’s songs into the hit that reignites his career, Rick sets out to reclaim the recognition he believes he deserves - even if it means risking everything he cares about.

2025.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu
2025.overview: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they have enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.

2025.title: Passenger
2025.overview: After a young couple witnesses a gruesome highway accident, they soon realize they did not leave the crash scene alone, as a demonic presence called the Passenger that won't stop until it claims them both turns their van life adventure into a nightmare.

2025.title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War
2025.overview: Jack Ryan is reluctantly pulled back into espionage when an international covert mission unravels a deadly conspiracy. Racing against time, he joins CIA allies Mike November & James Greer and sharp MI6 officer Emma Marlowe to battle a rogue black-ops unit in a high-stakes, deeply personal fight.

2025.title: Saccharine
2025.overview: After succumbing to an obscure weight-loss craze involving the eating of human ashes, lovelorn medical student Hana finds herself haunted by the ghost of the person she's eating.

2025.title: Pressure
